.opencode/specs/skilled-agent-orchestration/042-sk-deep-research-review-improvement-2/005-agent-improver-deep-loop-alignment/scratch/codex-gpt54-deep-research.md:2603:.opencode/specs/skilled-agent-orchestration/042-sk-deep-research-review-improvement-2/001-runtime-truth-foundation/checklist.md:37:- [x] CHK-004 [P0] REQ-003 `continuedFromRun` semantics are defined consistently for both active resume and completed-continue flows [EVIDENCE: command/state excerpts naming `continuedFromRun` or equivalent cursor fields across both continuation modes] [TESTS: `deep-research-contract-parity.vitest.ts`; `deep-review-contract-parity.vitest.ts`]

.opencode/specs/skilled-agent-orchestration/042-sk-deep-research-review-improvement-2/005-agent-improver-deep-loop-alignment/scratch/codex-gpt54-deep-research.md:2609:.opencode/specs/skilled-agent-orchestration/042-sk-deep-research-review-improvement-2/001-runtime-truth-foundation/implementation-summary.md:3:description: "Deep-loop runtime contracts, stop-reason taxonomy, legal-stop gates, resume semantics, journals, dashboards, and behavior-first test coverage for sk-deep-research and sk-deep-review."
.opencode/specs/skilled-agent-orchestration/042-sk-deep-research-review-improvement-2/005-agent-improver-deep-loop-alignment/scratch/codex-gpt54-deep-research.md:2610:.opencode/specs/skilled-agent-orchestration/042-sk-deep-research-review-improvement-2/001-runtime-truth-foundation/implementation-summary.md:9:  - "legal stop"
.opencode/specs/skilled-agent-orchestration/042-sk-deep-research-review-improvement-2/005-agent-improver-deep-loop-alignment/scratch/codex-gpt54-deep-research.md:2611:.opencode/specs/skilled-agent-orchestration/042-sk-deep-research-review-improvement-2/001-runtime-truth-foundation/implementation-summary.md:35:Deep research and deep review now have explicit, auditable runtime truth. Every loop stop reports a named reason from a shared taxonomy, every stop decision passes through a legal-stop gate that checks convergence, coverage, and quality together, and every session carries a resume cursor that makes continuation deterministic rather than inferred.
.opencode/specs/skilled-agent-orchestration/042-sk-deep-research-review-improvement-2/005-agent-improver-deep-loop-alignment/scratch/codex-gpt54-deep-research.md:2612:.opencode/specs/skilled-agent-orchestration/042-sk-deep-research-review-improvement-2/001-runtime-truth-foundation/implementation-summary.md:39:Both deep-loop products share a typed stop-reason taxonomy with named reasons (`converged`, `max_iterations`, `blocked`, `user_stop`, `error`). The legal-stop gate bundles convergence, coverage, and quality checks into a single binary decision. Blocked-stop events persist with gate results and recovery paths rather than silently terminating. The stop contract uses `stopReason`, `legalStop.blockedBy`, `legalStop.gateResults`, and `legalStop.replayInputs` fields.
.opencode/specs/skilled-agent-orchestration/042-sk-deep-research-review-improvement-2/005-agent-improver-deep-loop-alignment/scratch/codex-gpt54-deep-research.md:2613:.opencode/specs/skilled-agent-orchestration/042-sk-deep-research-review-improvement-2/001-runtime-truth-foundation/implementation-summary.md:43:Sessions now carry `continuedFromRun` semantics that work for both active resume (loop was blocked and continues) and completed-continue (loop finished and a new session extends the prior work). This lineage is explicit in commands, workflows, state contracts, and agent instructions.
.opencode/specs/skilled-agent-orchestration/042-sk-deep-research-review-improvement-2/005-agent-improver-deep-loop-alignment/scratch/codex-gpt54-deep-research.md:2614:.opencode/specs/skilled-agent-orchestration/042-sk-deep-research-review-improvement-2/001-runtime-truth-foundation/implementation-summary.md:47:Separate append-only journal artifacts track lifecycle events, stop decisions, and recovery actions. Dashboard upgrades expose timing/tool/token histograms, state diffs, anomaly flags, convergence trends, and stop-decision drill-down. Reducer snapshot/compaction ensures durability for 100+ iteration packets with delta replay and periodic snapshot equivalence.
.opencode/specs/skilled-agent-orchestration/042-sk-deep-research-review-improvement-2/005-agent-improver-deep-loop-alignment/scratch/codex-gpt54-deep-research.md:2615:.opencode/specs/skilled-agent-orchestration/042-sk-deep-research-review-improvement-2/001-runtime-truth-foundation/implementation-summary.md:59:Behavioral test suites cover lifecycle, blocked-stop, replay, resume, compaction equivalence, and semantic convergence scenarios for both loops. Contract parity tests enforce alignment across commands, skills, agents, and runtime mirrors.
.opencode/specs/skilled-agent-orchestration/042-sk-deep-research-review-improvement-2/005-agent-improver-deep-loop-alignment/scratch/codex-gpt54-deep-research.md:2616:.opencode/specs/skilled-agent-orchestration/042-sk-deep-research-review-improvement-2/001-runtime-truth-foundation/implementation-summary.md:77:| Shared stop-reason taxonomy across both loops | One auditable vocabulary without pretending research and review are the same workflow (ADR-001) |
.opencode/specs/skilled-agent-orchestration/042-sk-deep-research-review-improvement-2/005-agent-improver-deep-loop-alignment/scratch/codex-gpt54-deep-research.md:2617:.opencode/specs/skilled-agent-orchestration/042-sk-deep-research-review-improvement-2/001-runtime-truth-foundation/implementation-summary.md:78:| Legal-stop gate bundles convergence + coverage + quality | Prevents premature STOP when only one metric is favorable (ADR-001) |
.opencode/specs/skilled-agent-orchestration/042-sk-deep-research-review-improvement-2/005-agent-improver-deep-loop-alignment/scratch/codex-gpt54-deep-research.md:2618:.opencode/specs/skilled-agent-orchestration/042-sk-deep-research-review-improvement-2/001-runtime-truth-foundation/implementation-summary.md:79:| Claim-verification ledger uses JSONL canonical storage | Append-only, replayable, and machine-parseable without adding a database dependency (ADR-002) |
.opencode/specs/skilled-agent-orchestration/042-sk-deep-research-review-improvement-2/005-agent-improver-deep-loop-alignment/scratch/codex-gpt54-deep-research.md:2619:.opencode/specs/skilled-agent-orchestration/042-sk-deep-research-review-improvement-2/001-runtime-truth-foundation/implementation-summary.md:82:| Journals and ledgers stay separate append-only artifacts | Separation preserves clear lifecycle boundaries and replay independence (ADR-010) |
.opencode/specs/skilled-agent-orchestration/042-sk-deep-research-review-improvement-2/005-agent-improver-deep-loop-alignment/scratch/codex-gpt54-deep-research.md:2620:.opencode/specs/skilled-agent-orchestration/042-sk-deep-research-review-improvement-2/001-runtime-truth-foundation/implementation-summary.md:84:| Semantic convergence uses typed decision traces | Makes stop decisions explainable and auditable rather than hidden in scalar thresholds (ADR-008) |

.opencode/specs/skilled-agent-orchestration/042-sk-deep-research-review-improvement-2/005-agent-improver-deep-loop-alignment/scratch/codex-gpt54-deep-research.md:2625:.opencode/specs/skilled-agent-orchestration/042-sk-deep-research-review-improvement-2/001-runtime-truth-foundation/implementation-summary.md:112:1. **Phase 4b replay fixtures do not yet exist.** Deterministic replay gating for production promotion remains advisory-only until replay fixtures from Phase 1 traces are generated.
.opencode/specs/skilled-agent-orchestration/042-sk-deep-research-review-improvement-2/005-agent-improver-deep-loop-alignment/scratch/codex-gpt54-deep-research.md:2626:.opencode/specs/skilled-agent-orchestration/042-sk-deep-research-review-improvement-2/001-runtime-truth-foundation/decision-record.md:8:  - "claim ledger"
.opencode/specs/skilled-agent-orchestration/042-sk-deep-research-review-improvement-2/005-agent-improver-deep-loop-alignment/scratch/codex-gpt54-deep-research.md:2627:.opencode/specs/skilled-agent-orchestration/042-sk-deep-research-review-improvement-2/001-runtime-truth-foundation/decision-record.md:33:We need a runtime answer to "why did this loop stop?" that works across both deep research and deep review. Right now stop behavior is partly implied by convergence math, partly spread across workflow steps, and not strong enough for recovery, dashboards, or user trust.
.opencode/specs/skilled-agent-orchestration/042-sk-deep-research-review-improvement-2/005-agent-improver-deep-loop-alignment/scratch/codex-gpt54-deep-research.md:2628:.opencode/specs/skilled-agent-orchestration/042-sk-deep-research-review-improvement-2/001-runtime-truth-foundation/decision-record.md:42:**We chose**: a shared named stop-reason taxonomy plus a separate legal done gate.
.opencode/specs/skilled-agent-orchestration/042-sk-deep-research-review-improvement-2/005-agent-improver-deep-loop-alignment/scratch/codex-gpt54-deep-research.md:2629:.opencode/specs/skilled-agent-orchestration/042-sk-deep-research-review-improvement-2/001-runtime-truth-foundation/decision-record.md:52:| Separate taxonomies for research and review | Preserves product differences | Harder parity and resume behavior, more operator confusion | 5/10 |
.opencode/specs/skilled-agent-orchestration/042-sk-deep-research-review-improvement-2/005-agent-improver-deep-loop-alignment/scratch/codex-gpt54-deep-research.md:2630:.opencode/specs/skilled-agent-orchestration/042-sk-deep-research-review-improvement-2/001-runtime-truth-foundation/decision-record.md:59:- Dashboards, synthesis, and journals can report a single reason vocabulary.
.opencode/specs/skilled-agent-orchestration/042-sk-deep-research-review-improvement-2/005-agent-improver-deep-loop-alignment/scratch/codex-gpt54-deep-research.md:2631:.opencode/specs/skilled-agent-orchestration/042-sk-deep-research-review-improvement-2/001-runtime-truth-foundation/decision-record.md:60:- Blocked-stop cases become explicit instead of hidden in convergence math.
.opencode/specs/skilled-agent-orchestration/042-sk-deep-research-review-improvement-2/005-agent-improver-deep-loop-alignment/scratch/codex-gpt54-deep-research.md:2632:.opencode/specs/skilled-agent-orchestration/042-sk-deep-research-review-improvement-2/001-runtime-truth-foundation/decision-record.md:63:- We need synchronized changes across commands, assets, agents, and tests. Mitigation: make parity tests part of the same wave.
.opencode/specs/skilled-agent-orchestration/042-sk-deep-research-review-improvement-2/005-agent-improver-deep-loop-alignment/scratch/codex-gpt54-deep-research.md:2633:.opencode/specs/skilled-agent-orchestration/042-sk-deep-research-review-improvement-2/001-runtime-truth-foundation/decision-record.md:87:- Reducer/test surfaces learn blocked-stop reporting and resume-safe stop metadata.
.opencode/specs/skilled-agent-orchestration/042-sk-deep-research-review-improvement-2/005-agent-improver-deep-loop-alignment/scratch/codex-gpt54-deep-research.md:2634:.opencode/specs/skilled-agent-orchestration/042-sk-deep-research-review-improvement-2/001-runtime-truth-foundation/decision-record.md:106:Research packets need a durable way to show whether major claims were verified, contradicted, or left unresolved. A ledger must be machine-friendly enough for reducers and synthesis, but still readable in packet outputs.
.opencode/specs/skilled-agent-orchestration/042-sk-deep-research-review-improvement-2/005-agent-improver-deep-loop-alignment/scratch/codex-gpt54-deep-research.md:2635:.opencode/specs/skilled-agent-orchestration/042-sk-deep-research-review-improvement-2/001-runtime-truth-foundation/decision-record.md:110:- The ledger must be append-friendly and packet-local.
.opencode/specs/skilled-agent-orchestration/042-sk-deep-research-review-improvement-2/005-agent-improver-deep-loop-alignment/scratch/codex-gpt54-deep-research.md:2636:.opencode/specs/skilled-agent-orchestration/042-sk-deep-research-review-improvement-2/001-runtime-truth-foundation/decision-record.md:115:**We chose**: JSONL as the canonical ledger format, with rendered markdown summaries in synthesis/dashboard outputs when needed.
.opencode/specs/skilled-agent-orchestration/042-sk-deep-research-review-improvement-2/005-agent-improver-deep-loop-alignment/scratch/codex-gpt54-deep-research.md:2637:.opencode/specs/skilled-agent-orchestration/042-sk-deep-research-review-improvement-2/001-runtime-truth-foundation/decision-record.md:117:**How it works**: The runtime writes structured ledger entries as JSONL so reducers and tests can reason over them. Research synthesis can then summarize those entries in human-readable tables or narrative sections without making markdown the source of truth.
.opencode/specs/skilled-agent-orchestration/042-sk-deep-research-review-improvement-2/005-agent-improver-deep-loop-alignment/scratch/codex-gpt54-deep-research.md:2638:.opencode/specs/skilled-agent-orchestration/042-sk-deep-research-review-improvement-2/001-runtime-truth-foundation/decision-record.md:133:- Research summaries can cite the ledger without becoming hand-maintained ledgers themselves.
.opencode/specs/skilled-agent-orchestration/042-sk-deep-research-review-improvement-2/005-agent-improver-deep-loop-alignment/scratch/codex-gpt54-deep-research.md:2639:.opencode/specs/skilled-agent-orchestration/042-sk-deep-research-review-improvement-2/001-runtime-truth-foundation/decision-record.md:159:- Research state docs, reducer logic, and synthesis contracts define the ledger path and entry schema.
.opencode/specs/skilled-agent-orchestration/042-sk-deep-research-review-improvement-2/005-agent-improver-deep-loop-alignment/scratch/codex-gpt54-deep-research.md:2640:.opencode/specs/skilled-agent-orchestration/042-sk-deep-research-review-improvement-2/001-runtime-truth-foundation/decision-record.md:162:**How to roll back**: Remove the JSONL ledger artifact and revert synthesis/dashboard references to the prior citation-only model.
.opencode/specs/skilled-agent-orchestration/042-sk-deep-research-review-improvement-2/005-agent-improver-deep-loop-alignment/scratch/codex-gpt54-deep-research.md:2641:.opencode/specs/skilled-agent-orchestration/042-sk-deep-research-review-improvement-2/001-runtime-truth-foundation/decision-record.md:189:**How it works**: Reducers compute metrics from JSONL, journals, ledgers, and strategy/config files. Generated markdown remains the human-facing dashboard, while machine-readable sources stay authoritative underneath.
.opencode/specs/skilled-agent-orchestration/042-sk-deep-research-review-improvement-2/005-agent-improver-deep-loop-alignment/scratch/codex-gpt54-deep-research.md:2642:.opencode/specs/skilled-agent-orchestration/042-sk-deep-research-review-improvement-2/001-runtime-truth-foundation/decision-record.md:254:- We need optional perspective isolation without creating a separate parallel product.
.opencode/specs/skilled-agent-orchestration/042-sk-deep-research-review-improvement-2/005-agent-improver-deep-loop-alignment/scratch/codex-gpt54-deep-research.md:2643:.opencode/specs/skilled-agent-orchestration/042-sk-deep-research-review-improvement-2/001-runtime-truth-foundation/decision-record.md:394:The research pass found that deep-research still reparses full iteration markdown and rewrites derived artifacts on each reducer run, which will degrade badly on 100+ iteration packets. We need a durability strategy that keeps append-only truth while making replay and reducer regeneration affordable.
.opencode/specs/skilled-agent-orchestration/042-sk-deep-research-review-improvement-2/005-agent-improver-deep-loop-alignment/scratch/codex-gpt54-deep-research.md:2644:.opencode/specs/skilled-agent-orchestration/042-sk-deep-research-review-improvement-2/001-runtime-truth-foundation/decision-record.md:398:- The authoritative lineage must remain packet-local and replayable.
.opencode/specs/skilled-agent-orchestration/042-sk-deep-research-review-improvement-2/005-agent-improver-deep-loop-alignment/scratch/codex-gpt54-deep-research.md:2645:.opencode/specs/skilled-agent-orchestration/042-sk-deep-research-review-improvement-2/001-runtime-truth-foundation/decision-record.md:403:**We chose**: delta replay plus periodic packet snapshots and compaction, with compaction triggered by explicit thresholds such as run count or JSONL size.
.opencode/specs/skilled-agent-orchestration/042-sk-deep-research-review-improvement-2/005-agent-improver-deep-loop-alignment/scratch/codex-gpt54-deep-research.md:2646:.opencode/specs/skilled-agent-orchestration/042-sk-deep-research-review-improvement-2/001-runtime-truth-foundation/decision-record.md:405:**How it works**: Append-only events remain canonical. Reducers consume only the latest delta after a trusted snapshot, while replay validation confirms that post-compaction outputs match a full replay. Trigger policy stays configurable so we can tune by run count, JSONL size, or both without changing the contract.
.opencode/specs/skilled-agent-orchestration/042-sk-deep-research-review-improvement-2/005-agent-improver-deep-loop-alignment/scratch/codex-gpt54-deep-research.md:2647:.opencode/specs/skilled-agent-orchestration/042-sk-deep-research-review-improvement-2/001-runtime-truth-foundation/decision-record.md:411:| **Delta replay + periodic snapshots/compaction** | Preserves lineage truth, scales long packets, supports replay validation | Adds snapshot lifecycle and equivalence testing | 9/10 |
.opencode/specs/skilled-agent-orchestration/042-sk-deep-research-review-improvement-2/005-agent-improver-deep-loop-alignment/scratch/codex-gpt54-deep-research.md:2648:.opencode/specs/skilled-agent-orchestration/042-sk-deep-research-review-improvement-2/001-runtime-truth-foundation/decision-record.md:412:| Full replay on every reducer run | Simplest conceptual model | Degrades with packet size, expensive for 100+ iterations | 4/10 |
.opencode/specs/skilled-agent-orchestration/042-sk-deep-research-review-improvement-2/005-agent-improver-deep-loop-alignment/scratch/codex-gpt54-deep-research.md:2649:.opencode/specs/skilled-agent-orchestration/042-sk-deep-research-review-improvement-2/001-runtime-truth-foundation/decision-record.md:413:| Keep only latest reduced state, drop historical replay | Fast reducer path | Breaks auditability and replay confidence | 3/10 |
.opencode/specs/skilled-agent-orchestration/042-sk-deep-research-review-improvement-2/005-agent-improver-deep-loop-alignment/scratch/codex-gpt54-deep-research.md:2650:.opencode/specs/skilled-agent-orchestration/042-sk-deep-research-review-improvement-2/001-runtime-truth-foundation/decision-record.md:424:- Snapshot lifecycle, equivalence checks, and compaction triggers must be documented and tested together. Mitigation: make replay validation part of the compaction contract.
.opencode/specs/skilled-agent-orchestration/042-sk-deep-research-review-improvement-2/005-agent-improver-deep-loop-alignment/scratch/codex-gpt54-deep-research.md:2651:.opencode/specs/skilled-agent-orchestration/042-sk-deep-research-review-improvement-2/001-runtime-truth-foundation/decision-record.md:430:| Compaction accidentally drops recoverable lineage detail | High | Keep append-only truth canonical and block compaction finalization until replay equivalence passes. |
.opencode/specs/skilled-agent-orchestration/042-sk-deep-research-review-improvement-2/005-agent-improver-deep-loop-alignment/scratch/codex-gpt54-deep-research.md:2652:.opencode/specs/skilled-agent-orchestration/042-sk-deep-research-review-improvement-2/001-runtime-truth-foundation/decision-record.md:437:| 2 | **Beyond Local Maxima?** | PASS | We compared full replay and reduced-state-only shortcuts. |
.opencode/specs/skilled-agent-orchestration/042-sk-deep-research-review-improvement-2/005-agent-improver-deep-loop-alignment/scratch/codex-gpt54-deep-research.md:2653:.opencode/specs/skilled-agent-orchestration/042-sk-deep-research-review-improvement-2/001-runtime-truth-foundation/decision-record.md:438:| 3 | **Sufficient?** | PASS | Delta replay plus snapshots covers scale without sacrificing packet-local truth. |
.opencode/specs/skilled-agent-orchestration/042-sk-deep-research-review-improvement-2/005-agent-improver-deep-loop-alignment/scratch/codex-gpt54-deep-research.md:2654:.opencode/specs/skilled-agent-orchestration/042-sk-deep-research-review-improvement-2/001-runtime-truth-foundation/decision-record.md:447:- Config/state docs, reducer logic, dashboards, and workflow assets define snapshot metadata, compaction triggers, and replay validation.
.opencode/specs/skilled-agent-orchestration/042-sk-deep-research-review-improvement-2/005-agent-improver-deep-loop-alignment/scratch/codex-gpt54-deep-research.md:2655:.opencode/specs/skilled-agent-orchestration/042-sk-deep-research-review-improvement-2/001-runtime-truth-foundation/decision-record.md:448:- Reducer/schema tests add equivalence coverage for invalid-state, resume, completed-continue, and compaction cases.
.opencode/specs/skilled-agent-orchestration/042-sk-deep-research-review-improvement-2/005-agent-improver-deep-loop-alignment/scratch/codex-gpt54-deep-research.md:2656:.opencode/specs/skilled-agent-orchestration/042-sk-deep-research-review-improvement-2/001-runtime-truth-foundation/decision-record.md:450:**How to roll back**: Disable snapshot/compaction triggers, restore full replay, and remove compaction-specific test and dashboard surfaces.
.opencode/specs/skilled-agent-orchestration/042-sk-deep-research-review-improvement-2/005-agent-improver-deep-loop-alignment/scratch/codex-gpt54-deep-research.md:2657:.opencode/specs/skilled-agent-orchestration/042-sk-deep-research-review-improvement-2/001-runtime-truth-foundation/decision-record.md:465:The original packet placed behavior-first testing after most runtime changes. The research pass found that this leaves early contract work underprotected, especially for replay, invalid-state handling, blocked-stop behavior, and reducer durability.
.opencode/specs/skilled-agent-orchestration/042-sk-deep-research-review-improvement-2/005-agent-improver-deep-loop-alignment/scratch/codex-gpt54-deep-research.md:2658:.opencode/specs/skilled-agent-orchestration/042-sk-deep-research-review-improvement-2/001-runtime-truth-foundation/decision-record.md:474:**We chose**: start behavior/replay harness work immediately after Phase 1 contracts stabilize, and keep it running ahead of later substrate and trust-surface changes.
.opencode/specs/skilled-agent-orchestration/042-sk-deep-research-review-improvement-2/005-agent-improver-deep-loop-alignment/scratch/codex-gpt54-deep-research.md:2659:.opencode/specs/skilled-agent-orchestration/042-sk-deep-research-review-improvement-2/001-runtime-truth-foundation/decision-record.md:476:**How it works**: Phase 3 begins once the typed event schema exists. Thin replay fixtures and end-to-end harnesses are added early, then expanded as Phase 2a and 2b land. Parity alignment remains later, but it inherits a tested contract instead of defining one by prose alone.
.opencode/specs/skilled-agent-orchestration/042-sk-deep-research-review-improvement-2/005-agent-improver-deep-loop-alignment/scratch/codex-gpt54-deep-research.md:2660:.opencode/specs/skilled-agent-orchestration/042-sk-deep-research-review-improvement-2/001-runtime-truth-foundation/decision-record.md:482:| **Move behavior/replay harnesses earlier** | Protects contract work, catches substrate drift sooner, supports replay corpus growth | Requires parallel coordination with active runtime changes | 9/10 |
.opencode/specs/skilled-agent-orchestration/042-sk-deep-research-review-improvement-2/005-agent-improver-deep-loop-alignment/scratch/codex-gpt54-deep-research.md:2661:.opencode/specs/skilled-agent-orchestration/042-sk-deep-research-review-improvement-2/001-runtime-truth-foundation/decision-record.md:483:| Keep behavior tests after most runtime work | Simpler sequencing | Leaves early contracts unguarded and delays replay confidence | 4/10 |
.opencode/specs/skilled-agent-orchestration/042-sk-deep-research-review-improvement-2/005-agent-improver-deep-loop-alignment/scratch/codex-gpt54-deep-research.md:2662:.opencode/specs/skilled-agent-orchestration/042-sk-deep-research-review-improvement-2/001-runtime-truth-foundation/decision-record.md:484:| Rely on parity/schema tests only | Fastest to wire | Misses runtime behavior and replay regressions | 5/10 |
.opencode/specs/skilled-agent-orchestration/042-sk-deep-research-review-improvement-2/005-agent-improver-deep-loop-alignment/scratch/codex-gpt54-deep-research.md:2663:.opencode/specs/skilled-agent-orchestration/042-sk-deep-research-review-improvement-2/001-runtime-truth-foundation/decision-record.md:511:| 5 | **Open Horizons?** | PASS | Replay corpora can later feed offline optimizer work. |
.opencode/specs/skilled-agent-orchestration/042-sk-deep-research-review-improvement-2/005-agent-improver-deep-loop-alignment/scratch/codex-gpt54-deep-research.md:2664:.opencode/specs/skilled-agent-orchestration/042-sk-deep-research-review-improvement-2/001-runtime-truth-foundation/decision-record.md:518:- The plan and tasks move replay corpus and behavioral harness creation ahead of parity lock.
.opencode/specs/skilled-agent-orchestration/042-sk-deep-research-review-improvement-2/005-agent-improver-deep-loop-alignment/scratch/codex-gpt54-deep-research.md:2665:.opencode/specs/skilled-agent-orchestration/042-sk-deep-research-review-improvement-2/001-runtime-truth-foundation/decision-record.md:519:- Behavioral suites gain invalid-state, resume, completed-continue, blocked-stop, and compaction-equivalence fixtures before optional-mode coverage expands.
.opencode/specs/skilled-agent-orchestration/042-sk-deep-research-review-improvement-2/005-agent-improver-deep-loop-alignment/scratch/codex-gpt54-deep-research.md:2666:.opencode/specs/skilled-agent-orchestration/042-sk-deep-research-review-improvement-2/001-runtime-truth-foundation/decision-record.md:536:Current convergence is stronger than threshold-only math, but it is still mostly statistical plus coverage-based. The research pass showed that large packets need semantic novelty, contradiction density, and citation overlap to explain why the workflow decided to stop or continue.
.opencode/specs/skilled-agent-orchestration/042-sk-deep-research-review-improvement-2/005-agent-improver-deep-loop-alignment/scratch/codex-gpt54-deep-research.md:2667:.opencode/specs/skilled-agent-orchestration/042-sk-deep-research-review-improvement-2/001-runtime-truth-foundation/decision-record.md:540:- The result must stay packet-local and replayable.
.opencode/specs/skilled-agent-orchestration/042-sk-deep-research-review-improvement-2/005-agent-improver-deep-loop-alignment/scratch/codex-gpt54-deep-research.md:2668:.opencode/specs/skilled-agent-orchestration/042-sk-deep-research-review-improvement-2/001-runtime-truth-foundation/decision-record.md:553:| **Typed semantic decision trace** | Auditable, replayable, good debugging surface, supports future tuning | More schema fields and dashboard sections to maintain | 9/10 |
.opencode/specs/skilled-agent-orchestration/042-sk-deep-research-review-improvement-2/005-agent-improver-deep-loop-alignment/scratch/codex-gpt54-deep-research.md:2669:.opencode/specs/skilled-agent-orchestration/042-sk-deep-research-review-improvement-2/001-runtime-truth-foundation/decision-record.md:554:| Scalar-only convergence score | Compact and easy to compare | Hides why STOP happened and why it was blocked | 4/10 |
.opencode/specs/skilled-agent-orchestration/042-sk-deep-research-review-improvement-2/005-agent-improver-deep-loop-alignment/scratch/codex-gpt54-deep-research.md:2670:.opencode/specs/skilled-agent-orchestration/042-sk-deep-research-review-improvement-2/001-runtime-truth-foundation/decision-record.md:555:| Human-written semantic notes only | Flexible prose | Not machine-checkable, weak for replay and testing | 5/10 |
.opencode/specs/skilled-agent-orchestration/042-sk-deep-research-review-improvement-2/005-agent-improver-deep-loop-alignment/scratch/codex-gpt54-deep-research.md:2671:.opencode/specs/skilled-agent-orchestration/042-sk-deep-research-review-improvement-2/001-runtime-truth-foundation/decision-record.md:582:| 5 | **Open Horizons?** | PASS | Typed traces can later feed offline optimizer work. |
.opencode/specs/skilled-agent-orchestration/042-sk-deep-research-review-improvement-2/005-agent-improver-deep-loop-alignment/scratch/codex-gpt54-deep-research.md:2672:.opencode/specs/skilled-agent-orchestration/042-sk-deep-research-review-improvement-2/001-runtime-truth-foundation/decision-record.md:618:**How it works**: Recovery escalates through five bounded tiers: query reformulation, authority/source diversification, decomposition or clustering, contradiction-resolution/adjudication, and graceful partial closeout. Each tier records why it was selected, what changed, and whether it helped so later replay or offline tuning can learn from it.
.opencode/specs/skilled-agent-orchestration/042-sk-deep-research-review-improvement-2/005-agent-improver-deep-loop-alignment/scratch/codex-gpt54-deep-research.md:2673:.opencode/specs/skilled-agent-orchestration/042-sk-deep-research-review-improvement-2/001-runtime-truth-foundation/decision-record.md:624:| **Five-tier recovery ladder with provenance** | Clear escalation path, auditable, replay-friendly, useful for later tuning | More structured recovery events to maintain | 9/10 |
.opencode/specs/skilled-agent-orchestration/042-sk-deep-research-review-improvement-2/005-agent-improver-deep-loop-alignment/scratch/codex-gpt54-deep-research.md:2674:.opencode/specs/skilled-agent-orchestration/042-sk-deep-research-review-improvement-2/001-runtime-truth-foundation/decision-record.md:637:- More recovery metadata in journals and dashboards. Mitigation: keep the first ladder compact and packet-local.
.opencode/specs/skilled-agent-orchestration/042-sk-deep-research-review-improvement-2/005-agent-improver-deep-loop-alignment/scratch/codex-gpt54-deep-research.md:2675:.opencode/specs/skilled-agent-orchestration/042-sk-deep-research-review-improvement-2/001-runtime-truth-foundation/decision-record.md:653:| 5 | **Open Horizons?** | PASS | Provenance can later feed offline compiler/optimizer work. |
.opencode/specs/skilled-agent-orchestration/042-sk-deep-research-review-improvement-2/005-agent-improver-deep-loop-alignment/scratch/codex-gpt54-deep-research.md:2676:.opencode/specs/skilled-agent-orchestration/042-sk-deep-research-review-improvement-2/001-runtime-truth-foundation/decision-record.md:660:- Loop protocol, state schema, journals, dashboards, and behavioral fixtures define the five recovery tiers and their provenance fields.
.opencode/specs/skilled-agent-orchestration/042-sk-deep-research-review-improvement-2/005-agent-improver-deep-loop-alignment/scratch/codex-gpt54-deep-research.md:2677:.opencode/specs/skilled-agent-orchestration/042-sk-deep-research-review-improvement-2/001-runtime-truth-foundation/decision-record.md:679:This packet now needs both provenance-oriented journals and verification-oriented ledgers. They are related, but they serve different access patterns and lifecycle needs. If we overload the iteration JSONL stream or hide them inside a hand-edited strategy document, replay, auditing, and reducer ownership all become less clear.
.opencode/specs/skilled-agent-orchestration/042-sk-deep-research-review-improvement-2/005-agent-improver-deep-loop-alignment/scratch/codex-gpt54-deep-research.md:2678:.opencode/specs/skilled-agent-orchestration/042-sk-deep-research-review-improvement-2/001-runtime-truth-foundation/decision-record.md:683:- Journals and ledgers must stay packet-local and append-only.
.opencode/specs/skilled-agent-orchestration/042-sk-deep-research-review-improvement-2/005-agent-improver-deep-loop-alignment/scratch/codex-gpt54-deep-research.md:2679:.opencode/specs/skilled-agent-orchestration/042-sk-deep-research-review-improvement-2/001-runtime-truth-foundation/decision-record.md:689:**We chose**: journals and ledgers are separate packet-local append-only files, not embedded in iteration JSONL.
.opencode/specs/skilled-agent-orchestration/042-sk-deep-research-review-improvement-2/005-agent-improver-deep-loop-alignment/scratch/codex-gpt54-deep-research.md:2680:.opencode/specs/skilled-agent-orchestration/042-sk-deep-research-review-improvement-2/001-runtime-truth-foundation/decision-record.md:697:| **Separate packet-local append-only journals and ledgers** | Clean separation of concerns, clearer replay, better reducer ownership, easier audit access patterns | Adds two explicit artifact contracts to maintain | 9/10 |
.opencode/specs/skilled-agent-orchestration/042-sk-deep-research-review-improvement-2/005-agent-improver-deep-loop-alignment/scratch/codex-gpt54-deep-research.md:2681:.opencode/specs/skilled-agent-orchestration/042-sk-deep-research-review-improvement-2/001-runtime-truth-foundation/decision-record.md:698:| Embed journals and ledgers in iteration JSONL | Single file surface | Overloads the event stream, blurs artifact purpose, harder replay and tooling ergonomics | 4/10 |
.opencode/specs/skilled-agent-orchestration/042-sk-deep-research-review-improvement-2/005-agent-improver-deep-loop-alignment/scratch/codex-gpt54-deep-research.md:2682:.opencode/specs/skilled-agent-orchestration/042-sk-deep-research-review-improvement-2/001-runtime-truth-foundation/decision-record.md:699:| Embed journals and ledgers in a hand-edited strategy document | Human-visible location | Not append-only, conflicts with reducer-owned sections, weak machine contract | 3/10 |
.opencode/specs/skilled-agent-orchestration/042-sk-deep-research-review-improvement-2/005-agent-improver-deep-loop-alignment/scratch/codex-gpt54-deep-research.md:2683:.opencode/specs/skilled-agent-orchestration/042-sk-deep-research-review-improvement-2/001-runtime-truth-foundation/decision-record.md:701:**Why this one**: JSONL should stay focused on iteration events. Provenance concerns and verification-state concerns need different append-only artifacts so replay and auditability stay explicit.
.opencode/specs/skilled-agent-orchestration/042-sk-deep-research-review-improvement-2/005-agent-improver-deep-loop-alignment/scratch/codex-gpt54-deep-research.md:2684:.opencode/specs/skilled-agent-orchestration/042-sk-deep-research-review-improvement-2/001-runtime-truth-foundation/decision-record.md:706:- Packet replay can reason about iteration events, provenance, and verification state separately.
.opencode/specs/skilled-agent-orchestration/042-sk-deep-research-review-improvement-2/005-agent-improver-deep-loop-alignment/scratch/codex-gpt54-deep-research.md:2685:.opencode/specs/skilled-agent-orchestration/042-sk-deep-research-review-improvement-2/001-runtime-truth-foundation/decision-record.md:707:- Reducer ownership stays clearer because journals and ledgers no longer compete with hand-edited strategy sections.
.opencode/specs/skilled-agent-orchestration/042-sk-deep-research-review-improvement-2/005-agent-improver-deep-loop-alignment/scratch/codex-gpt54-deep-research.md:2686:.opencode/specs/skilled-agent-orchestration/042-sk-deep-research-review-improvement-2/001-runtime-truth-foundation/decision-record.md:725:| 4 | **Fits Goal?** | PASS | Runtime truth depends on clear artifact ownership and replayable state. |
.opencode/specs/skilled-agent-orchestration/042-sk-deep-research-review-improvement-2/005-agent-improver-deep-loop-alignment/scratch/codex-gpt54-deep-research.md:2687:.opencode/specs/skilled-agent-orchestration/042-sk-deep-research-review-improvement-2/001-runtime-truth-foundation/decision-record.md:726:| 5 | **Open Horizons?** | PASS | Separate artifacts leave room for richer dashboards and replay tooling later. |
.opencode/specs/skilled-agent-orchestration/042-sk-deep-research-review-improvement-2/005-agent-improver-deep-loop-alignment/scratch/codex-gpt54-deep-research.md:2688:.opencode/specs/skilled-agent-orchestration/042-sk-deep-research-review-improvement-2/001-runtime-truth-foundation/decision-record.md:733:- State-format, loop-protocol, reducer, and dashboard docs define journals and ledgers as separate packet-local append-only artifacts.
.opencode/specs/skilled-agent-orchestration/042-sk-deep-research-review-improvement-2/005-agent-improver-deep-loop-alignment/scratch/codex-gpt54-deep-research.md:2689:.opencode/specs/skilled-agent-orchestration/042-sk-deep-research-review-improvement-2/001-runtime-truth-foundation/decision-record.md:734:- Behavioral and parity coverage assert that iteration JSONL remains focused on iteration events while journals and ledgers own their respective concerns.
.opencode/specs/skilled-agent-orchestration/042-sk-deep-research-review-improvement-2/005-agent-improver-deep-loop-alignment/scratch/codex-gpt54-deep-research.md:2690:.opencode/specs/skilled-agent-orchestration/042-sk-deep-research-review-improvement-2/001-runtime-truth-foundation/plan.md:34:This implementation plan ships the deep-loop improvements in five phases. The sequence now incorporates the new research-driven gaps around snapshot/compaction durability, packet-local observability, large-target decomposition, semantic convergence, deep-review reducer ownership, and upfront agent-instruction cleanup. Phase 2 is split into `2a` and `2b`, while behavior/replay verification moves forward so it can protect contract work soon after the shared runtime foundation lands.
.opencode/specs/skilled-agent-orchestration/042-sk-deep-research-review-improvement-2/005-agent-improver-deep-loop-alignment/scratch/codex-gpt54-deep-research.md:2691:.opencode/specs/skilled-agent-orchestration/042-sk-deep-research-review-improvement-2/001-runtime-truth-foundation/plan.md:57:- [x] Journals, dashboards, observability surfaces, and claim-ledger artifacts are defined and behavior-tested where applicable.
.opencode/specs/skilled-agent-orchestration/042-sk-deep-research-review-improvement-2/005-agent-improver-deep-loop-alignment/scratch/codex-gpt54-deep-research.md:2692:.opencode/specs/skilled-agent-orchestration/042-sk-deep-research-review-improvement-2/001-runtime-truth-foundation/plan.md:58:- [x] Snapshot/compaction, replay validation, and large-target decomposition rules are designed before optional advanced modes begin.
.opencode/specs/skilled-agent-orchestration/042-sk-deep-research-review-improvement-2/005-agent-improver-deep-loop-alignment/scratch/codex-gpt54-deep-research.md:2693:.opencode/specs/skilled-agent-orchestration/042-sk-deep-research-review-improvement-2/001-runtime-truth-foundation/plan.md:59:- [x] Semantic convergence and reducer-owned machine-section boundaries are documented across both loop products.
.opencode/specs/skilled-agent-orchestration/042-sk-deep-research-review-improvement-2/005-agent-improver-deep-loop-alignment/scratch/codex-gpt54-deep-research.md:2694:.opencode/specs/skilled-agent-orchestration/042-sk-deep-research-review-improvement-2/001-runtime-truth-foundation/plan.md:88:  -> define typed stop-decision events, legal done gates, blocked-stop persistence, resume cursor, and replayable lineage schema
.opencode/specs/skilled-agent-orchestration/042-sk-deep-research-review-improvement-2/005-agent-improver-deep-loop-alignment/scratch/codex-gpt54-deep-research.md:2695:.opencode/specs/skilled-agent-orchestration/042-sk-deep-research-review-improvement-2/001-runtime-truth-foundation/plan.md:91:  -> add separate journal artifacts, snapshot/compaction, reducer durability, observability rollups, and decomposition scaffolding
.opencode/specs/skilled-agent-orchestration/042-sk-deep-research-review-improvement-2/005-agent-improver-deep-loop-alignment/scratch/codex-gpt54-deep-research.md:2696:.opencode/specs/skilled-agent-orchestration/042-sk-deep-research-review-improvement-2/001-runtime-truth-foundation/plan.md:94:  -> add claim ledger, ledger transition rules, publication critique, promotion checkpoints, semantic convergence, and reducer-owned review machine sections
.opencode/specs/skilled-agent-orchestration/042-sk-deep-research-review-improvement-2/005-agent-improver-deep-loop-alignment/scratch/codex-gpt54-deep-research.md:2697:.opencode/specs/skilled-agent-orchestration/042-sk-deep-research-review-improvement-2/001-runtime-truth-foundation/plan.md:97:  -> start thin lifecycle/blocked-stop/replay harnesses immediately after the Phase 1 lock
.opencode/specs/skilled-agent-orchestration/042-sk-deep-research-review-improvement-2/005-agent-improver-deep-loop-alignment/scratch/codex-gpt54-deep-research.md:2698:.opencode/specs/skilled-agent-orchestration/042-sk-deep-research-review-improvement-2/001-runtime-truth-foundation/plan.md:98:  -> then expand into reducer/schema extensions, semantic convergence, and wider integration fixtures
.opencode/specs/skilled-agent-orchestration/042-sk-deep-research-review-improvement-2/005-agent-improver-deep-loop-alignment/scratch/codex-gpt54-deep-research.md:2699:.opencode/specs/skilled-agent-orchestration/042-sk-deep-research-review-improvement-2/001-runtime-truth-foundation/plan.md:118:**Why first**: Every later improvement depends on a trusted answer to four questions: why did the loop stop, was STOP legal, where can a session resume, and can the stop decision be replayed from packet-local state. The agent instructions also need to stop fighting the reducer contract before broader runtime work begins.
.opencode/specs/skilled-agent-orchestration/042-sk-deep-research-review-improvement-2/005-agent-improver-deep-loop-alignment/scratch/codex-gpt54-deep-research.md:2700:.opencode/specs/skilled-agent-orchestration/042-sk-deep-research-review-improvement-2/001-runtime-truth-foundation/plan.md:123:- `.opencode/skill/sk-deep-research/references/convergence.md`
.opencode/specs/skilled-agent-orchestration/042-sk-deep-research-review-improvement-2/005-agent-improver-deep-loop-alignment/scratch/codex-gpt54-deep-research.md:2701:.opencode/specs/skilled-agent-orchestration/042-sk-deep-research-review-improvement-2/001-runtime-truth-foundation/plan.md:128:- `.opencode/skill/sk-deep-review/references/convergence.md`
.opencode/specs/skilled-agent-orchestration/042-sk-deep-research-review-improvement-2/005-agent-improver-deep-loop-alignment/scratch/codex-gpt54-deep-research.md:2702:.opencode/specs/skilled-agent-orchestration/042-sk-deep-research-review-improvement-2/001-runtime-truth-foundation/plan.md:146:- Add fixture-based cases that prove blocked-stop behavior and replayable stop-decision logging when convergence math passes but quality gates fail.
.opencode/specs/skilled-agent-orchestration/042-sk-deep-research-review-improvement-2/005-agent-improver-deep-loop-alignment/scratch/codex-gpt54-deep-research.md:2703:.opencode/specs/skilled-agent-orchestration/042-sk-deep-research-review-improvement-2/001-runtime-truth-foundation/plan.md:153:**Why second**: Separate journal artifacts, compaction, observability, and large-target decomposition all build on the Phase 1 event schema and need to exist before trust surfaces or optional modes can be trusted at scale. Journals land here as their own packet-local append-only files; ledgers stay deferred to Phase 2b.
.opencode/specs/skilled-agent-orchestration/042-sk-deep-research-review-improvement-2/005-agent-improver-deep-loop-alignment/scratch/codex-gpt54-deep-research.md:2704:.opencode/specs/skilled-agent-orchestration/042-sk-deep-research-review-improvement-2/001-runtime-truth-foundation/plan.md:178:- Reducer fixtures prove separate append-only journal artifacts, journal rollups, delta replay, snapshot/compaction equivalence, and dashboard regeneration remain idempotent.
.opencode/specs/skilled-agent-orchestration/042-sk-deep-research-review-improvement-2/005-agent-improver-deep-loop-alignment/scratch/codex-gpt54-deep-research.md:2705:.opencode/specs/skilled-agent-orchestration/042-sk-deep-research-review-improvement-2/001-runtime-truth-foundation/plan.md:186:**Why third**: Once the substrate is durable and observable, we can safely layer the trust surfaces that decide what evidence is promoted, how ledger transitions work, what convergence means semantically, and which sections stay machine-owned.
.opencode/specs/skilled-agent-orchestration/042-sk-deep-research-review-improvement-2/005-agent-improver-deep-loop-alignment/scratch/codex-gpt54-deep-research.md:2706:.opencode/specs/skilled-agent-orchestration/042-sk-deep-research-review-improvement-2/001-runtime-truth-foundation/plan.md:190:- `.opencode/skill/sk-deep-research/references/convergence.md`
.opencode/specs/skilled-agent-orchestration/042-sk-deep-research-review-improvement-2/005-agent-improver-deep-loop-alignment/scratch/codex-gpt54-deep-research.md:2707:.opencode/specs/skilled-agent-orchestration/042-sk-deep-research-review-improvement-2/001-runtime-truth-foundation/plan.md:196:- `.opencode/skill/sk-deep-review/references/convergence.md`
.opencode/specs/skilled-agent-orchestration/042-sk-deep-research-review-improvement-2/005-agent-improver-deep-loop-alignment/scratch/codex-gpt54-deep-research.md:2708:.opencode/specs/skilled-agent-orchestration/042-sk-deep-research-review-improvement-2/001-runtime-truth-foundation/plan.md:212:- Semantic convergence fixtures assert novelty, contradiction density, and citation overlap participate in typed stop-decision traces instead of scalar-only thresholds.
.opencode/specs/skilled-agent-orchestration/042-sk-deep-research-review-improvement-2/005-agent-improver-deep-loop-alignment/scratch/codex-gpt54-deep-research.md:2709:.opencode/specs/skilled-agent-orchestration/042-sk-deep-research-review-improvement-2/001-runtime-truth-foundation/plan.md:219:**Why now**: This phase starts immediately after the Phase 1 lock so replay harnesses can protect substrate and trust-surface work while those phases are still being implemented. The first fixture slice stays narrow on lifecycle, blocked-stop, and replay before it expands into semantic convergence and richer trust-surface scenarios.
.opencode/specs/skilled-agent-orchestration/042-sk-deep-research-review-improvement-2/005-agent-improver-deep-loop-alignment/scratch/codex-gpt54-deep-research.md:2710:.opencode/specs/skilled-agent-orchestration/042-sk-deep-research-review-improvement-2/001-runtime-truth-foundation/plan.md:226:- `.opencode/skill/system-spec-kit/scripts/tests/fixtures/deep-loop-replay/028/`

.opencode/specs/skilled-agent-orchestration/042-sk-deep-research-review-improvement-2/005-agent-improver-deep-loop-alignment/scratch/codex-gpt54-deep-research.md:2714:.opencode/specs/skilled-agent-orchestration/042-sk-deep-research-review-improvement-2/001-runtime-truth-foundation/plan.md:234:- Research behavior tests should assert falsifiable question framing, citation presence, conclusion confidence, clustering, semantic convergence, and stop-reason persistence.

.opencode/specs/skilled-agent-orchestration/042-sk-deep-research-review-improvement-2/005-agent-improver-deep-loop-alignment/scratch/codex-gpt54-deep-research.md:2716:.opencode/specs/skilled-agent-orchestration/042-sk-deep-research-review-improvement-2/001-runtime-truth-foundation/plan.md:241:**Why after early verification**: Once the foundational and trust contracts have replay-backed coverage, parity and mirror alignment can move as one bounded follow-on without guessing at unstable interim surfaces.
.opencode/specs/skilled-agent-orchestration/042-sk-deep-research-review-improvement-2/005-agent-improver-deep-loop-alignment/scratch/codex-gpt54-deep-research.md:2717:.opencode/specs/skilled-agent-orchestration/042-sk-deep-research-review-improvement-2/001-runtime-truth-foundation/plan.md:262:- Operator-facing command examples should remain compact while replay, observability, and advanced modes are discoverable.

.opencode/specs/skilled-agent-orchestration/042-sk-deep-research-review-improvement-2/005-agent-improver-deep-loop-alignment/scratch/codex-gpt54-deep-research.md:2723:.opencode/specs/skilled-agent-orchestration/042-sk-deep-research-review-improvement-2/002-semantic-coverage-graph/plan.md:7:  - "semantic coverage graph"

.opencode/specs/skilled-agent-orchestration/042-sk-deep-research-review-improvement-2/005-agent-improver-deep-loop-alignment/scratch/codex-gpt54-deep-research.md:2725:.opencode/specs/skilled-agent-orchestration/042-sk-deep-research-review-improvement-2/002-semantic-coverage-graph/plan.md:36:This phase is a concrete build plan, not a moonshot placeholder. We already know which graph primitives exist, how they map to coverage semantics, which tables are required, what the MCP tools need to do, and how graph convergence must interact with Phase 001 runtime truth. Research findings also show that reuse is narrower than first estimated, so the plan now makes adaptation work explicit instead of treating it as incidental. The sequence is:

.opencode/specs/skilled-agent-orchestration/042-sk-deep-research-review-improvement-2/005-agent-improver-deep-loop-alignment/scratch/codex-gpt54-deep-research.md:2730:.opencode/specs/skilled-agent-orchestration/042-sk-deep-research-review-improvement-2/002-semantic-coverage-graph/plan.md:66:- [x] `reduce-state.cjs` ingests `graphEvents`, performs MCP upsert/convergence when available, recalibrates inherited weights for coverage semantics, and preserves local fallback behavior.
