.opencode/specs/skilled-agent-orchestration/042-sk-deep-research-review-improvement-2/005-agent-improver-deep-loop-alignment/scratch/codex-gpt54-deep-research.md:2745:.opencode/specs/skilled-agent-orchestration/042-sk-deep-research-review-improvement-2/002-semantic-coverage-graph/plan.md:212:1. Define the reducer/MCP contract: payload shape, sync-vs-async behavior, latency budget, authority order, and replay semantics.
.opencode/specs/skilled-agent-orchestration/042-sk-deep-research-review-improvement-2/005-agent-improver-deep-loop-alignment/scratch/codex-gpt54-deep-research.md:2746:.opencode/specs/skilled-agent-orchestration/042-sk-deep-research-review-improvement-2/002-semantic-coverage-graph/plan.md:213:2. Calibrate coverage-specific edge weights against reducer outputs and convergence behavior instead of blindly inheriting memory-causal values.
.opencode/specs/skilled-agent-orchestration/042-sk-deep-research-review-improvement-2/005-agent-improver-deep-loop-alignment/scratch/codex-gpt54-deep-research.md:2747:.opencode/specs/skilled-agent-orchestration/042-sk-deep-research-review-improvement-2/002-semantic-coverage-graph/plan.md:216:- Start from authoritative JSONL replay and reducer-local graph rebuild, then mirror into MCP projection state when available.
.opencode/specs/skilled-agent-orchestration/042-sk-deep-research-review-improvement-2/005-agent-improver-deep-loop-alignment/scratch/codex-gpt54-deep-research.md:2748:.opencode/specs/skilled-agent-orchestration/042-sk-deep-research-review-improvement-2/002-semantic-coverage-graph/plan.md:218:- Upsert graph nodes/edges before computing final convergence, but fall back to reducer-local state whenever MCP exceeds the defined latency budget or is unavailable.
.opencode/specs/skilled-agent-orchestration/042-sk-deep-research-review-improvement-2/005-agent-improver-deep-loop-alignment/scratch/codex-gpt54-deep-research.md:2749:.opencode/specs/skilled-agent-orchestration/042-sk-deep-research-review-improvement-2/002-semantic-coverage-graph/plan.md:219:- Merge graph convergence with the Phase 001 `shouldContinue` decision instead of bypassing it.
.opencode/specs/skilled-agent-orchestration/042-sk-deep-research-review-improvement-2/005-agent-improver-deep-loop-alignment/scratch/codex-gpt54-deep-research.md:2750:.opencode/specs/skilled-agent-orchestration/042-sk-deep-research-review-improvement-2/002-semantic-coverage-graph/plan.md:221:- Record calibrated relation weights and guard thresholds as implementation outputs of this phase, not post-hoc tuning work.
.opencode/specs/skilled-agent-orchestration/042-sk-deep-research-review-improvement-2/005-agent-improver-deep-loop-alignment/scratch/codex-gpt54-deep-research.md:2751:.opencode/specs/skilled-agent-orchestration/042-sk-deep-research-review-improvement-2/002-semantic-coverage-graph/plan.md:225:- Reducer can persist graph state, read graph convergence, and explain STOP blockers with graph context.
.opencode/specs/skilled-agent-orchestration/042-sk-deep-research-review-improvement-2/005-agent-improver-deep-loop-alignment/scratch/codex-gpt54-deep-research.md:2752:.opencode/specs/skilled-agent-orchestration/042-sk-deep-research-review-improvement-2/002-semantic-coverage-graph/plan.md:226:- Fallback path is explicit, replay-safe, and ordered `JSONL -> local JSON -> SQLite projection`.
.opencode/specs/skilled-agent-orchestration/042-sk-deep-research-review-improvement-2/005-agent-improver-deep-loop-alignment/scratch/codex-gpt54-deep-research.md:2753:.opencode/specs/skilled-agent-orchestration/042-sk-deep-research-review-improvement-2/002-semantic-coverage-graph/plan.md:230:- Named coverage-graph convergence/tool suites
.opencode/specs/skilled-agent-orchestration/042-sk-deep-research-review-improvement-2/005-agent-improver-deep-loop-alignment/scratch/codex-gpt54-deep-research.md:2754:.opencode/specs/skilled-agent-orchestration/042-sk-deep-research-review-improvement-2/002-semantic-coverage-graph/plan.md:237:**Goal**: Make graph events and graph-aware convergence part of the human- and agent-facing loop contract.
.opencode/specs/skilled-agent-orchestration/042-sk-deep-research-review-improvement-2/005-agent-improver-deep-loop-alignment/scratch/codex-gpt54-deep-research.md:2755:.opencode/specs/skilled-agent-orchestration/042-sk-deep-research-review-improvement-2/002-semantic-coverage-graph/plan.md:241:- `.opencode/skill/sk-deep-research/references/convergence.md`
.opencode/specs/skilled-agent-orchestration/042-sk-deep-research-review-improvement-2/005-agent-improver-deep-loop-alignment/scratch/codex-gpt54-deep-research.md:2756:.opencode/specs/skilled-agent-orchestration/042-sk-deep-research-review-improvement-2/002-semantic-coverage-graph/plan.md:243:- `.opencode/skill/sk-deep-review/references/convergence.md`
.opencode/specs/skilled-agent-orchestration/042-sk-deep-research-review-improvement-2/005-agent-improver-deep-loop-alignment/scratch/codex-gpt54-deep-research.md:2757:.opencode/specs/skilled-agent-orchestration/042-sk-deep-research-review-improvement-2/002-semantic-coverage-graph/plan.md:258:- Contract sanity checks through the named convergence/tool suites
.opencode/specs/skilled-agent-orchestration/042-sk-deep-research-review-improvement-2/005-agent-improver-deep-loop-alignment/scratch/codex-gpt54-deep-research.md:2758:.opencode/specs/skilled-agent-orchestration/042-sk-deep-research-review-improvement-2/002-semantic-coverage-graph/plan.md:268:| Unit | Edge manager behavior, traversal, signal math, contradiction handling, convergence helpers | `coverage-graph-core.vitest.ts`, `coverage-graph-signals.vitest.ts`, `coverage-graph-convergence.vitest.ts` |
.opencode/specs/skilled-agent-orchestration/042-sk-deep-research-review-improvement-2/005-agent-improver-deep-loop-alignment/scratch/codex-gpt54-deep-research.md:2759:.opencode/specs/skilled-agent-orchestration/042-sk-deep-research-review-improvement-2/002-semantic-coverage-graph/plan.md:270:| MCP Tool | Input validation, query dispatch, status output, and convergence output contracts | `coverage-graph-tools.vitest.ts` |
.opencode/specs/skilled-agent-orchestration/042-sk-deep-research-review-improvement-2/005-agent-improver-deep-loop-alignment/scratch/codex-gpt54-deep-research.md:2760:.opencode/specs/skilled-agent-orchestration/042-sk-deep-research-review-improvement-2/002-semantic-coverage-graph/plan.md:283:| Phase `001-runtime-truth-foundation` | Internal | Green | Graph convergence would have no legal stop-decision envelope to extend. |
.opencode/specs/skilled-agent-orchestration/042-sk-deep-research-review-improvement-2/005-agent-improver-deep-loop-alignment/scratch/codex-gpt54-deep-research.md:2761:.opencode/specs/skilled-agent-orchestration/042-sk-deep-research-review-improvement-2/002-semantic-coverage-graph/plan.md:304:- **Trigger**: Graph extraction breaks existing graph behavior, or graph convergence produces incorrect legal STOP decisions.
.opencode/specs/skilled-agent-orchestration/042-sk-deep-research-review-improvement-2/005-agent-improver-deep-loop-alignment/scratch/codex-gpt54-deep-research.md:2762:.opencode/specs/skilled-agent-orchestration/042-sk-deep-research-review-improvement-2/002-semantic-coverage-graph/plan.md:307:  2. Revert reducer convergence back to Phase 001 scalar-only behavior.
.opencode/specs/skilled-agent-orchestration/042-sk-deep-research-review-improvement-2/005-agent-improver-deep-loop-alignment/scratch/codex-gpt54-deep-research.md:2763:.opencode/specs/skilled-agent-orchestration/042-sk-deep-research-review-improvement-2/002-semantic-coverage-graph/plan.md:308:  3. Leave the dedicated graph store and extracted helper files isolated until behavior is corrected and replay-tested.
.opencode/specs/skilled-agent-orchestration/042-sk-deep-research-review-improvement-2/005-agent-improver-deep-loop-alignment/scratch/codex-gpt54-deep-research.md:2764:.opencode/specs/skilled-agent-orchestration/042-sk-deep-research-review-improvement-2/002-semantic-coverage-graph/implementation-summary.md:3:description: "Coverage-graph substrate for deep-loop convergence: 4 CJS shared libraries, dedicated SQLite database, 4 MCP tools, reducer integration seam, and 101 graph tests."
.opencode/specs/skilled-agent-orchestration/042-sk-deep-research-review-improvement-2/005-agent-improver-deep-loop-alignment/scratch/codex-gpt54-deep-research.md:2765:.opencode/specs/skilled-agent-orchestration/042-sk-deep-research-review-improvement-2/002-semantic-coverage-graph/implementation-summary.md:7:  - "semantic coverage graph"
.opencode/specs/skilled-agent-orchestration/042-sk-deep-research-review-improvement-2/005-agent-improver-deep-loop-alignment/scratch/codex-gpt54-deep-research.md:2766:.opencode/specs/skilled-agent-orchestration/042-sk-deep-research-review-improvement-2/002-semantic-coverage-graph/implementation-summary.md:9:  - "coverage graph"
.opencode/specs/skilled-agent-orchestration/042-sk-deep-research-review-improvement-2/005-agent-improver-deep-loop-alignment/scratch/codex-gpt54-deep-research.md:2767:.opencode/specs/skilled-agent-orchestration/042-sk-deep-research-review-improvement-2/002-semantic-coverage-graph/implementation-summary.md:35:Semantic convergence now has a concrete graph substrate. Deep research and deep review can track coverage gaps, contradictions, provenance chains, and unverified claims through a dedicated SQLite database and four MCP tools, all backed by shared CJS libraries extracted from the existing Spec Kit Memory graph infrastructure.
.opencode/specs/skilled-agent-orchestration/042-sk-deep-research-review-improvement-2/005-agent-improver-deep-loop-alignment/scratch/codex-gpt54-deep-research.md:2768:.opencode/specs/skilled-agent-orchestration/042-sk-deep-research-review-improvement-2/002-semantic-coverage-graph/implementation-summary.md:39:Four CommonJS shared libraries were extracted and adapted from existing graph modules: `coverage-graph-core.cjs` (edge management, weight clamping, self-loop prevention, provenance traversal), `coverage-graph-signals.cjs` (degree, depth, momentum, cluster metrics), `coverage-graph-contradictions.cjs` (CONTRADICTS-edge scanning, contradiction-pair reporting), and `coverage-graph-convergence.cjs` (graph-aware convergence helpers combining graph signals with Phase 001 stop-trace inputs). Reuse posture was 35-45% direct, 25-30% adapted, with the remainder genuinely new loop semantics.
.opencode/specs/skilled-agent-orchestration/042-sk-deep-research-review-improvement-2/005-agent-improver-deep-loop-alignment/scratch/codex-gpt54-deep-research.md:2769:.opencode/specs/skilled-agent-orchestration/042-sk-deep-research-review-improvement-2/002-semantic-coverage-graph/implementation-summary.md:43:A dedicated `deep-loop-graph.sqlite` database stores coverage nodes, edges, and snapshots with schema versioning, migrations, indexes, and namespace isolation by `spec_folder + loop_type + session_id`. Research and review ontologies maintain separate relation maps and weight estimates.
.opencode/specs/skilled-agent-orchestration/042-sk-deep-research-review-improvement-2/005-agent-improver-deep-loop-alignment/scratch/codex-gpt54-deep-research.md:2770:.opencode/specs/skilled-agent-orchestration/042-sk-deep-research-review-improvement-2/002-semantic-coverage-graph/implementation-summary.md:47:Four MCP handlers were added to the existing Spec Kit Memory server: `deep_loop_graph_upsert` (idempotent node/edge creation with self-loop rejection and clamped weights), `deep_loop_graph_query` (structured queries for uncovered questions, unverified claims, contradictions, provenance chains, coverage gaps, and hot nodes), `deep_loop_graph_status` (grouped counts and signal values), and `deep_loop_graph_convergence` (blockers and typed decision traces).
.opencode/specs/skilled-agent-orchestration/042-sk-deep-research-review-improvement-2/005-agent-improver-deep-loop-alignment/scratch/codex-gpt54-deep-research.md:2771:.opencode/specs/skilled-agent-orchestration/042-sk-deep-research-review-improvement-2/002-semantic-coverage-graph/implementation-summary.md:51:The reducer/MCP contract defines explicit payload inputs/outputs, latency budget, replay semantics, and fallback behavior. The reducer parses iteration `graphEvents`, normalizes payloads, and calls `deep_loop_graph_upsert`. Convergence decisions merge graph blockers into `shouldContinue` with a local JSON graph fallback when MCP is unavailable. The fallback authority chain is `JSONL -> local JSON graph -> SQLite projection`.
.opencode/specs/skilled-agent-orchestration/042-sk-deep-research-review-improvement-2/005-agent-improver-deep-loop-alignment/scratch/codex-gpt54-deep-research.md:2772:.opencode/specs/skilled-agent-orchestration/042-sk-deep-research-review-improvement-2/002-semantic-coverage-graph/implementation-summary.md:55:Both deep-loop agent prompts now emit structured graph events (research: question, finding, claim, source; review: dimension, file, finding, evidence, remediation). Contract docs define the `graphEvents` JSONL format and graph-aware convergence model for each loop.
.opencode/specs/skilled-agent-orchestration/042-sk-deep-research-review-improvement-2/005-agent-improver-deep-loop-alignment/scratch/codex-gpt54-deep-research.md:2773:.opencode/specs/skilled-agent-orchestration/042-sk-deep-research-review-improvement-2/002-semantic-coverage-graph/implementation-summary.md:63:Implementation proceeded through 5 sub-phases: extract graph primitives, build coverage graph database, add MCP tools, define reducer/MCP contract and integrate reducer, and agent/convergence integration. 25 files were touched (17 new), adding approximately 5,200 lines. 101 tests cover edge management, signals, graph-aware convergence, MCP DB behavior, and tool integration.
.opencode/specs/skilled-agent-orchestration/042-sk-deep-research-review-improvement-2/005-agent-improver-deep-loop-alignment/scratch/codex-gpt54-deep-research.md:2774:.opencode/specs/skilled-agent-orchestration/042-sk-deep-research-review-improvement-2/002-semantic-coverage-graph/implementation-summary.md:73:| Reuse-first extraction from existing graph modules | Avoids greenfield duplication while acknowledging that reducer/convergence work is not plug-and-play |
.opencode/specs/skilled-agent-orchestration/042-sk-deep-research-review-improvement-2/005-agent-improver-deep-loop-alignment/scratch/codex-gpt54-deep-research.md:2775:.opencode/specs/skilled-agent-orchestration/042-sk-deep-research-review-improvement-2/002-semantic-coverage-graph/implementation-summary.md:74:| Dedicated `deep-loop-graph.sqlite` rather than sharing the memory graph DB | Keeps coverage graph namespace-isolated and independently evolvable |
.opencode/specs/skilled-agent-orchestration/042-sk-deep-research-review-improvement-2/005-agent-improver-deep-loop-alignment/scratch/codex-gpt54-deep-research.md:2776:.opencode/specs/skilled-agent-orchestration/042-sk-deep-research-review-improvement-2/002-semantic-coverage-graph/implementation-summary.md:76:| Explicit reducer/MCP contract with latency budget | Prevents silent timeouts from degrading convergence decisions |
.opencode/specs/skilled-agent-orchestration/042-sk-deep-research-review-improvement-2/005-agent-improver-deep-loop-alignment/scratch/codex-gpt54-deep-research.md:2777:.opencode/specs/skilled-agent-orchestration/042-sk-deep-research-review-improvement-2/002-semantic-coverage-graph/implementation-summary.md:78:| Coverage-specific weight calibration | Inherited memory weights replaced by coverage-aware values before convergence is finalized |
.opencode/specs/skilled-agent-orchestration/042-sk-deep-research-review-improvement-2/005-agent-improver-deep-loop-alignment/scratch/codex-gpt54-deep-research.md:2778:.opencode/specs/skilled-agent-orchestration/042-sk-deep-research-review-improvement-2/002-semantic-coverage-graph/implementation-summary.md:88:| Edge management, signals, and convergence unit tests | PASS (101 tests) |
.opencode/specs/skilled-agent-orchestration/042-sk-deep-research-review-improvement-2/005-agent-improver-deep-loop-alignment/scratch/codex-gpt54-deep-research.md:2779:.opencode/specs/skilled-agent-orchestration/042-sk-deep-research-review-improvement-2/002-semantic-coverage-graph/implementation-summary.md:89:| MCP DB schema behavior and upsert/query/status/convergence tools | PASS |
.opencode/specs/skilled-agent-orchestration/042-sk-deep-research-review-improvement-2/005-agent-improver-deep-loop-alignment/scratch/codex-gpt54-deep-research.md:2780:.opencode/specs/skilled-agent-orchestration/042-sk-deep-research-review-improvement-2/002-semantic-coverage-graph/implementation-summary.md:102:2. **Weight calibration uses initial estimates.** Coverage-specific edge weights are set with initial calibration values; real calibration data from production runs will refine them.
.opencode/specs/skilled-agent-orchestration/042-sk-deep-research-review-improvement-2/005-agent-improver-deep-loop-alignment/scratch/codex-gpt54-deep-research.md:2781:.opencode/specs/skilled-agent-orchestration/042-sk-deep-research-review-improvement-2/002-semantic-coverage-graph/spec.md:3:description: "Define the coverage-graph substrate for deep research and deep review by extracting reusable graph primitives from the Spec Kit Memory MCP server and applying them to deep-loop convergence."
.opencode/specs/skilled-agent-orchestration/042-sk-deep-research-review-improvement-2/005-agent-improver-deep-loop-alignment/scratch/codex-gpt54-deep-research.md:2782:.opencode/specs/skilled-agent-orchestration/042-sk-deep-research-review-improvement-2/002-semantic-coverage-graph/spec.md:6:  - "semantic coverage graph"
.opencode/specs/skilled-agent-orchestration/042-sk-deep-research-review-improvement-2/005-agent-improver-deep-loop-alignment/scratch/codex-gpt54-deep-research.md:2783:.opencode/specs/skilled-agent-orchestration/042-sk-deep-research-review-improvement-2/002-semantic-coverage-graph/spec.md:8:  - "deep_loop_graph_convergence"
.opencode/specs/skilled-agent-orchestration/042-sk-deep-research-review-improvement-2/005-agent-improver-deep-loop-alignment/scratch/codex-gpt54-deep-research.md:2784:.opencode/specs/skilled-agent-orchestration/042-sk-deep-research-review-improvement-2/002-semantic-coverage-graph/spec.md:22:Phase 002 turns semantic convergence from an abstract idea into a concrete implementation plan. The coverage graph is the fourth graph system in the existing Spec Kit Memory stack, following the causal graph, the code structural graph, and the graph-signal layer already present under `.opencode/skill/system-spec-kit/mcp_server/`.
.opencode/specs/skilled-agent-orchestration/042-sk-deep-research-review-improvement-2/005-agent-improver-deep-loop-alignment/scratch/codex-gpt54-deep-research.md:2785:.opencode/specs/skilled-agent-orchestration/042-sk-deep-research-review-improvement-2/002-semantic-coverage-graph/spec.md:24:The design target is explicit reuse, not greenfield invention. Research findings revise the reuse estimate to roughly 35-45% direct reuse, 25-30% adapted reuse, and the remainder genuinely new loop semantics. Edge management from `causal-edges.ts`, degree/depth metrics from `graph-signals.ts`, contradiction-reporting patterns from `contradiction-detection.ts`, and SQLite setup patterns from `code-graph-db.ts` transfer well, but contradiction adjudication, convergence design, and reducer/MCP integration are not plug-and-play. Phase 001 remains the legal stop-decision foundation. Phase 002 adds graph context so low novelty only permits STOP when coverage, verification, and contradiction state agree.
.opencode/specs/skilled-agent-orchestration/042-sk-deep-research-review-improvement-2/005-agent-improver-deep-loop-alignment/scratch/codex-gpt54-deep-research.md:2786:.opencode/specs/skilled-agent-orchestration/042-sk-deep-research-review-improvement-2/002-semantic-coverage-graph/spec.md:40:| **Successor** | `../003-wave-executor/spec.md` |
.opencode/specs/skilled-agent-orchestration/042-sk-deep-research-review-improvement-2/005-agent-improver-deep-loop-alignment/scratch/codex-gpt54-deep-research.md:2787:.opencode/specs/skilled-agent-orchestration/042-sk-deep-research-review-improvement-2/002-semantic-coverage-graph/spec.md:41:| **Handoff Criteria** | Phase 003 can consume graph-backed coverage, contradiction, provenance, and convergence signals without introducing a second graph model. |
.opencode/specs/skilled-agent-orchestration/042-sk-deep-research-review-improvement-2/005-agent-improver-deep-loop-alignment/scratch/codex-gpt54-deep-research.md:2788:.opencode/specs/skilled-agent-orchestration/042-sk-deep-research-review-improvement-2/002-semantic-coverage-graph/spec.md:47:**Role in Packet 042**: Phase 001 established legal stop reasons, typed convergence traces, and reducer ownership. Phase 002 adds the semantic substrate needed to explain whether the loop has actually covered the problem space. Phase 003 depends on this phase to drive wave and segment decisions. Phase 004 depends on the persisted graph and snapshots for offline optimization and replay analysis.
.opencode/specs/skilled-agent-orchestration/042-sk-deep-research-review-improvement-2/005-agent-improver-deep-loop-alignment/scratch/codex-gpt54-deep-research.md:2789:.opencode/specs/skilled-agent-orchestration/042-sk-deep-research-review-improvement-2/002-semantic-coverage-graph/spec.md:55:- Shared coverage-graph CommonJS helpers for edge management, signals, contradictions, and convergence.
.opencode/specs/skilled-agent-orchestration/042-sk-deep-research-review-improvement-2/005-agent-improver-deep-loop-alignment/scratch/codex-gpt54-deep-research.md:2790:.opencode/specs/skilled-agent-orchestration/042-sk-deep-research-review-improvement-2/002-semantic-coverage-graph/spec.md:57:- Four new `deep_loop_graph_*` MCP tools on the existing Spec Kit Memory MCP server: `upsert`, `query`, `status`, and `convergence`.
.opencode/specs/skilled-agent-orchestration/042-sk-deep-research-review-improvement-2/005-agent-improver-deep-loop-alignment/scratch/codex-gpt54-deep-research.md:2791:.opencode/specs/skilled-agent-orchestration/042-sk-deep-research-review-improvement-2/002-semantic-coverage-graph/spec.md:58:- Reducer integration that defines the reducer/MCP seam explicitly, writes graph deltas after each iteration, and queries graph-aware convergence.
.opencode/specs/skilled-agent-orchestration/042-sk-deep-research-review-improvement-2/005-agent-improver-deep-loop-alignment/scratch/codex-gpt54-deep-research.md:2792:.opencode/specs/skilled-agent-orchestration/042-sk-deep-research-review-improvement-2/002-semantic-coverage-graph/spec.md:76:This is not a missing-technology problem. The existing Spec Kit Memory MCP server already contains mature graph patterns for typed weighted edges, breadth-first traversal, contradiction detection, degree and depth signals, historical momentum, and SQLite-backed graph storage. What is missing is a loop-native graph ontology and persistence layer that applies those patterns to deep research and deep review.
.opencode/specs/skilled-agent-orchestration/042-sk-deep-research-review-improvement-2/005-agent-improver-deep-loop-alignment/scratch/codex-gpt54-deep-research.md:2793:.opencode/specs/skilled-agent-orchestration/042-sk-deep-research-review-improvement-2/002-semantic-coverage-graph/spec.md:80:Define an implementation-ready semantic coverage graph that reuses existing graph infrastructure, persists loop-scoped graph state in `deep-loop-graph.sqlite`, and feeds graph-backed convergence into the existing Phase 001 stop-decision logic without replacing `newInfoRatio` or other established runtime-truth signals.
.opencode/specs/skilled-agent-orchestration/042-sk-deep-research-review-improvement-2/005-agent-improver-deep-loop-alignment/scratch/codex-gpt54-deep-research.md:2794:.opencode/specs/skilled-agent-orchestration/042-sk-deep-research-review-improvement-2/002-semantic-coverage-graph/spec.md:91:- Define research and review graph ontologies, including node kinds, relation types, initial weight estimates, metadata contracts, and convergence metrics.
.opencode/specs/skilled-agent-orchestration/042-sk-deep-research-review-improvement-2/005-agent-improver-deep-loop-alignment/scratch/codex-gpt54-deep-research.md:2795:.opencode/specs/skilled-agent-orchestration/042-sk-deep-research-review-improvement-2/002-semantic-coverage-graph/spec.md:94:- Calibrate coverage-specific edge weights during implementation instead of treating inherited memory-causal weights as final.
.opencode/specs/skilled-agent-orchestration/042-sk-deep-research-review-improvement-2/005-agent-improver-deep-loop-alignment/scratch/codex-gpt54-deep-research.md:2796:.opencode/specs/skilled-agent-orchestration/042-sk-deep-research-review-improvement-2/002-semantic-coverage-graph/spec.md:95:- Modify the deep-research reducer so it consumes iteration `graphEvents`, defines the reducer/MCP contract explicitly, upserts graph state, queries graph convergence, and falls back to a local JSON graph file when MCP is unavailable.
.opencode/specs/skilled-agent-orchestration/042-sk-deep-research-review-improvement-2/005-agent-improver-deep-loop-alignment/scratch/codex-gpt54-deep-research.md:2797:.opencode/specs/skilled-agent-orchestration/042-sk-deep-research-review-improvement-2/002-semantic-coverage-graph/spec.md:96:- Update the deep-research and deep-review reference docs and agent prompts so iterations emit graph events and use graph-aware convergence language.
.opencode/specs/skilled-agent-orchestration/042-sk-deep-research-review-improvement-2/005-agent-improver-deep-loop-alignment/scratch/codex-gpt54-deep-research.md:2798:.opencode/specs/skilled-agent-orchestration/042-sk-deep-research-review-improvement-2/002-semantic-coverage-graph/spec.md:97:- Add the listed unit and integration tests for graph core logic, signals, convergence, DB behavior, and tool behavior.
.opencode/specs/skilled-agent-orchestration/042-sk-deep-research-review-improvement-2/005-agent-improver-deep-loop-alignment/scratch/codex-gpt54-deep-research.md:2799:.opencode/specs/skilled-agent-orchestration/042-sk-deep-research-review-improvement-2/002-semantic-coverage-graph/spec.md:101:- Phase 003 wave scheduling, segment partitioning, or multi-wave orchestration logic.
.opencode/specs/skilled-agent-orchestration/042-sk-deep-research-review-improvement-2/005-agent-improver-deep-loop-alignment/scratch/codex-gpt54-deep-research.md:2800:.opencode/specs/skilled-agent-orchestration/042-sk-deep-research-review-improvement-2/002-semantic-coverage-graph/spec.md:102:- Phase 004 replay optimization, threshold tuning, or promotion heuristics derived from graph history.
.opencode/specs/skilled-agent-orchestration/042-sk-deep-research-review-improvement-2/005-agent-improver-deep-loop-alignment/scratch/codex-gpt54-deep-research.md:2801:.opencode/specs/skilled-agent-orchestration/042-sk-deep-research-review-improvement-2/002-semantic-coverage-graph/spec.md:113:| `.opencode/skill/system-spec-kit/scripts/lib/coverage-graph-core.cjs` | Create | Shared edge manager, relation-weight maps, clamping, self-loop prevention, edge update history, and provenance traversal helpers extracted from `causal-edges.ts`. |
.opencode/specs/skilled-agent-orchestration/042-sk-deep-research-review-improvement-2/005-agent-improver-deep-loop-alignment/scratch/codex-gpt54-deep-research.md:2802:.opencode/specs/skilled-agent-orchestration/042-sk-deep-research-review-improvement-2/002-semantic-coverage-graph/spec.md:116:| `.opencode/skill/system-spec-kit/scripts/lib/coverage-graph-convergence.cjs` | Create | Research/review convergence-signal assembly and typed decision-trace helpers. |
.opencode/specs/skilled-agent-orchestration/042-sk-deep-research-review-improvement-2/005-agent-improver-deep-loop-alignment/scratch/codex-gpt54-deep-research.md:2803:.opencode/specs/skilled-agent-orchestration/042-sk-deep-research-review-improvement-2/002-semantic-coverage-graph/spec.md:128:| `.opencode/skill/system-spec-kit/mcp_server/handlers/coverage-graph/convergence.ts` | Create | Handler for typed graph-aware convergence assessment and blocker reporting. |
.opencode/specs/skilled-agent-orchestration/042-sk-deep-research-review-improvement-2/005-agent-improver-deep-loop-alignment/scratch/codex-gpt54-deep-research.md:2804:.opencode/specs/skilled-agent-orchestration/042-sk-deep-research-review-improvement-2/002-semantic-coverage-graph/spec.md:135:| `.opencode/skill/sk-deep-research/scripts/reduce-state.cjs` | Modify | Ingest iteration `graphEvents`, define the reducer/MCP contract, push graph deltas to MCP, query convergence, enforce the fallback authority chain, and keep a local JSON fallback path. |
.opencode/specs/skilled-agent-orchestration/042-sk-deep-research-review-improvement-2/005-agent-improver-deep-loop-alignment/scratch/codex-gpt54-deep-research.md:2805:.opencode/specs/skilled-agent-orchestration/042-sk-deep-research-review-improvement-2/002-semantic-coverage-graph/spec.md:137:| `.opencode/skill/sk-deep-research/references/convergence.md` | Modify | Define graph-aware convergence language, decision interplay with `newInfoRatio`, and legal STOP semantics. |
.opencode/specs/skilled-agent-orchestration/042-sk-deep-research-review-improvement-2/005-agent-improver-deep-loop-alignment/scratch/codex-gpt54-deep-research.md:2806:.opencode/specs/skilled-agent-orchestration/042-sk-deep-research-review-improvement-2/002-semantic-coverage-graph/spec.md:139:| `.opencode/skill/sk-deep-review/references/convergence.md` | Modify | Define graph-aware review convergence signals and contradiction handling. |
.opencode/specs/skilled-agent-orchestration/042-sk-deep-research-review-improvement-2/005-agent-improver-deep-loop-alignment/scratch/codex-gpt54-deep-research.md:2807:.opencode/specs/skilled-agent-orchestration/042-sk-deep-research-review-improvement-2/002-semantic-coverage-graph/spec.md:149:| `.opencode/skill/system-spec-kit/scripts/tests/coverage-graph-convergence.vitest.ts` | Create | Verify research/review convergence signals and typed STOP decisions. |
.opencode/specs/skilled-agent-orchestration/042-sk-deep-research-review-improvement-2/005-agent-improver-deep-loop-alignment/scratch/codex-gpt54-deep-research.md:2808:.opencode/specs/skilled-agent-orchestration/042-sk-deep-research-review-improvement-2/002-semantic-coverage-graph/spec.md:155:Research findings revise the original reuse estimate downward: Phase 002 is now planned as 35-45% direct reuse, 25-30% adapted reuse, and the remainder genuinely new loop semantics. Direct reuse is concentrated in graph primitives and DB lifecycle patterns; adapted work is concentrated in contradiction handling, convergence design, and reducer/MCP integration.
.opencode/specs/skilled-agent-orchestration/042-sk-deep-research-review-improvement-2/005-agent-improver-deep-loop-alignment/scratch/codex-gpt54-deep-research.md:2809:.opencode/specs/skilled-agent-orchestration/042-sk-deep-research-review-improvement-2/002-semantic-coverage-graph/spec.md:166:The weights below are initial estimates inherited from memory-causal graph heuristics. They are implementation starting points, not final truth constants, and MUST be recalibrated for coverage semantics before convergence thresholds are considered stable.
.opencode/specs/skilled-agent-orchestration/042-sk-deep-research-review-improvement-2/005-agent-improver-deep-loop-alignment/scratch/codex-gpt54-deep-research.md:2810:.opencode/specs/skilled-agent-orchestration/042-sk-deep-research-review-improvement-2/002-semantic-coverage-graph/spec.md:180:These review weights are also initial estimates inherited from memory-causal graph behavior. Implementation MUST validate whether they should influence traversal only, convergence scoring, or both, and recalibrate them accordingly.
.opencode/specs/skilled-agent-orchestration/042-sk-deep-research-review-improvement-2/005-agent-improver-deep-loop-alignment/scratch/codex-gpt54-deep-research.md:2811:.opencode/specs/skilled-agent-orchestration/042-sk-deep-research-review-improvement-2/002-semantic-coverage-graph/spec.md:198:- Namespace boundary: `spec_folder + loop_type + session_id`
.opencode/specs/skilled-agent-orchestration/042-sk-deep-research-review-improvement-2/005-agent-improver-deep-loop-alignment/scratch/codex-gpt54-deep-research.md:2812:.opencode/specs/skilled-agent-orchestration/042-sk-deep-research-review-improvement-2/002-semantic-coverage-graph/spec.md:205:- `loop_type TEXT NOT NULL CHECK(loop_type IN ('research', 'review'))`
.opencode/specs/skilled-agent-orchestration/042-sk-deep-research-review-improvement-2/005-agent-improver-deep-loop-alignment/scratch/codex-gpt54-deep-research.md:2813:.opencode/specs/skilled-agent-orchestration/042-sk-deep-research-review-improvement-2/002-semantic-coverage-graph/spec.md:216:- `idx_coverage_folder_type(spec_folder, loop_type)`
.opencode/specs/skilled-agent-orchestration/042-sk-deep-research-review-improvement-2/005-agent-improver-deep-loop-alignment/scratch/codex-gpt54-deep-research.md:2814:.opencode/specs/skilled-agent-orchestration/042-sk-deep-research-review-improvement-2/002-semantic-coverage-graph/spec.md:238:- `loop_type TEXT NOT NULL`
.opencode/specs/skilled-agent-orchestration/042-sk-deep-research-review-improvement-2/005-agent-improver-deep-loop-alignment/scratch/codex-gpt54-deep-research.md:2815:.opencode/specs/skilled-agent-orchestration/042-sk-deep-research-review-improvement-2/002-semantic-coverage-graph/spec.md:242:- `weight REAL DEFAULT 1.0 CHECK(weight >= 0.0 AND weight <= 1.5)`
.opencode/specs/skilled-agent-orchestration/042-sk-deep-research-review-improvement-2/005-agent-improver-deep-loop-alignment/scratch/codex-gpt54-deep-research.md:2816:.opencode/specs/skilled-agent-orchestration/042-sk-deep-research-review-improvement-2/002-semantic-coverage-graph/spec.md:251:- `idx_coverage_edge_folder_type(spec_folder, loop_type)`
.opencode/specs/skilled-agent-orchestration/042-sk-deep-research-review-improvement-2/005-agent-improver-deep-loop-alignment/scratch/codex-gpt54-deep-research.md:2817:.opencode/specs/skilled-agent-orchestration/042-sk-deep-research-review-improvement-2/002-semantic-coverage-graph/spec.md:257:- `loop_type TEXT NOT NULL`
.opencode/specs/skilled-agent-orchestration/042-sk-deep-research-review-improvement-2/005-agent-improver-deep-loop-alignment/scratch/codex-gpt54-deep-research.md:2818:.opencode/specs/skilled-agent-orchestration/042-sk-deep-research-review-improvement-2/002-semantic-coverage-graph/spec.md:263:- `UNIQUE(spec_folder, loop_type, iteration)`
.opencode/specs/skilled-agent-orchestration/042-sk-deep-research-review-improvement-2/005-agent-improver-deep-loop-alignment/scratch/codex-gpt54-deep-research.md:2819:.opencode/specs/skilled-agent-orchestration/042-sk-deep-research-review-improvement-2/002-semantic-coverage-graph/spec.md:287:| `deep_loop_graph_upsert` | Reducer writes graph deltas after each iteration | Idempotent node/edge upsert, clamped weights, self-loop rejection, metadata updates on repeated IDs |
.opencode/specs/skilled-agent-orchestration/042-sk-deep-research-review-improvement-2/005-agent-improver-deep-loop-alignment/scratch/codex-gpt54-deep-research.md:2820:.opencode/specs/skilled-agent-orchestration/042-sk-deep-research-review-improvement-2/002-semantic-coverage-graph/spec.md:290:| `deep_loop_graph_convergence` | Composite convergence assessment | Return `decision`, `signals`, `blockers`, and a typed `trace` explaining STOP legality |
.opencode/specs/skilled-agent-orchestration/042-sk-deep-research-review-improvement-2/005-agent-improver-deep-loop-alignment/scratch/codex-gpt54-deep-research.md:2821:.opencode/specs/skilled-agent-orchestration/042-sk-deep-research-review-improvement-2/002-semantic-coverage-graph/spec.md:292:Standalone visualization is explicitly deferred to a later phase. Phase 002 only requires the four reducer-facing MCP tools above; dashboards can render summaries from status/convergence outputs and the local derived graph state.
.opencode/specs/skilled-agent-orchestration/042-sk-deep-research-review-improvement-2/005-agent-improver-deep-loop-alignment/scratch/codex-gpt54-deep-research.md:2822:.opencode/specs/skilled-agent-orchestration/042-sk-deep-research-review-improvement-2/002-semantic-coverage-graph/spec.md:307:`sourceDiversity` and `evidenceDepth` are blocking guards, not informational votes. STOP remains blocked when either guard is below threshold, even if the weighted signals look favorable.
.opencode/specs/skilled-agent-orchestration/042-sk-deep-research-review-improvement-2/005-agent-improver-deep-loop-alignment/scratch/codex-gpt54-deep-research.md:2823:.opencode/specs/skilled-agent-orchestration/042-sk-deep-research-review-improvement-2/002-semantic-coverage-graph/spec.md:321:When MCP is unavailable, truth flows in this order: append-only iteration JSONL (`graphEvents`) -> local derived JSON graph rebuilt by the reducer -> SQLite projection maintained by MCP. The current spec deliberately calls out that the reducer/MCP seam is under-specified today; implementation MUST define the exact contract for payload shape, sync model, latency budget, fallback behavior, and replay semantics before reducer integration is considered complete.
.opencode/specs/skilled-agent-orchestration/042-sk-deep-research-review-improvement-2/005-agent-improver-deep-loop-alignment/scratch/codex-gpt54-deep-research.md:2824:.opencode/specs/skilled-agent-orchestration/042-sk-deep-research-review-improvement-2/002-semantic-coverage-graph/spec.md:326:4. Reducer calls `deep_loop_graph_convergence`.
.opencode/specs/skilled-agent-orchestration/042-sk-deep-research-review-improvement-2/005-agent-improver-deep-loop-alignment/scratch/codex-gpt54-deep-research.md:2825:.opencode/specs/skilled-agent-orchestration/042-sk-deep-research-review-improvement-2/002-semantic-coverage-graph/spec.md:328:6. Dashboard/synthesis surfaces consume status/convergence summaries plus locally derived graph context.
.opencode/specs/skilled-agent-orchestration/042-sk-deep-research-review-improvement-2/005-agent-improver-deep-loop-alignment/scratch/codex-gpt54-deep-research.md:2826:.opencode/specs/skilled-agent-orchestration/042-sk-deep-research-review-improvement-2/002-semantic-coverage-graph/spec.md:329:7. If MCP is unavailable, reducer preserves replayability from JSONL plus the local JSON graph artifact until MCP recovers.
.opencode/specs/skilled-agent-orchestration/042-sk-deep-research-review-improvement-2/005-agent-improver-deep-loop-alignment/scratch/codex-gpt54-deep-research.md:2827:.opencode/specs/skilled-agent-orchestration/042-sk-deep-research-review-improvement-2/002-semantic-coverage-graph/spec.md:343:| REQ-003 | Research coverage graphs MUST use the defined node kinds, relation types, initial weight estimates, and metadata contract. | `QUESTION`, `FINDING`, `CLAIM`, and `SOURCE` are canonical; all listed research relations appear unchanged; initial weight estimates are documented as inherited starting points and a calibration task is carried through plan/tasks; research metrics use the defined formulas. |
.opencode/specs/skilled-agent-orchestration/042-sk-deep-research-review-improvement-2/005-agent-improver-deep-loop-alignment/scratch/codex-gpt54-deep-research.md:2828:.opencode/specs/skilled-agent-orchestration/042-sk-deep-research-review-improvement-2/002-semantic-coverage-graph/spec.md:344:| REQ-004 | Review coverage graphs MUST use the defined node kinds, relation types, initial weight estimates, and metadata contract. | `DIMENSION`, `FILE`, `FINDING`, `EVIDENCE`, and `REMEDIATION` are canonical; all listed review relations appear unchanged; initial weight estimates are documented as inherited starting points and a calibration task is carried through plan/tasks; review metrics use the defined formulas. |
.opencode/specs/skilled-agent-orchestration/042-sk-deep-research-review-improvement-2/005-agent-improver-deep-loop-alignment/scratch/codex-gpt54-deep-research.md:2829:.opencode/specs/skilled-agent-orchestration/042-sk-deep-research-review-improvement-2/002-semantic-coverage-graph/spec.md:345:| REQ-005 | The Spec Kit Memory MCP server MUST expose the four `deep_loop_graph_*` tools with the contracts defined in this phase. | `upsert`, `query`, `status`, and `convergence` are all represented in handler scope and `tool-schemas.ts`; query types and output shapes are explicit; visualization is explicitly deferred. |
.opencode/specs/skilled-agent-orchestration/042-sk-deep-research-review-improvement-2/005-agent-improver-deep-loop-alignment/scratch/codex-gpt54-deep-research.md:2830:.opencode/specs/skilled-agent-orchestration/042-sk-deep-research-review-improvement-2/002-semantic-coverage-graph/spec.md:346:| REQ-006 | Graph convergence MUST contextualize Phase 001 stop logic without replacing `newInfoRatio`. | The phase explicitly states that low novelty plus strong coverage can allow legal STOP, while low novelty plus uncovered questions, unresolved contradictions, or failed coverage guards (`sourceDiversity`, `evidenceDepth`) must block legal STOP. |
.opencode/specs/skilled-agent-orchestration/042-sk-deep-research-review-improvement-2/005-agent-improver-deep-loop-alignment/scratch/codex-gpt54-deep-research.md:2831:.opencode/specs/skilled-agent-orchestration/042-sk-deep-research-review-improvement-2/002-semantic-coverage-graph/spec.md:352:| REQ-007 | The deep-research reducer MUST ingest `graphEvents`, persist them, and query graph convergence after each iteration. | `reduce-state.cjs` is named in scope; reducer flow is documented step by step; fallback behavior is defined for MCP-unavailable runs. |
.opencode/specs/skilled-agent-orchestration/042-sk-deep-research-review-improvement-2/005-agent-improver-deep-loop-alignment/scratch/codex-gpt54-deep-research.md:2832:.opencode/specs/skilled-agent-orchestration/042-sk-deep-research-review-improvement-2/002-semantic-coverage-graph/spec.md:353:| REQ-008 | Deep-research and deep-review state/convergence references and agents MUST emit graph-native artifacts. | Both state-format reference files document `graphEvents`; both convergence reference files explain graph-aware signals; both agent files instruct iterations to emit graph nodes and edges. |
.opencode/specs/skilled-agent-orchestration/042-sk-deep-research-review-improvement-2/005-agent-improver-deep-loop-alignment/scratch/codex-gpt54-deep-research.md:2833:.opencode/specs/skilled-agent-orchestration/042-sk-deep-research-review-improvement-2/002-semantic-coverage-graph/spec.md:354:| REQ-009 | The phase MUST add the listed verification files for shared graph logic and MCP behavior. | `coverage-graph-core.vitest.ts`, `coverage-graph-signals.vitest.ts`, `coverage-graph-convergence.vitest.ts`, `coverage-graph-db.vitest.ts`, and `coverage-graph-tools.vitest.ts` all appear in scope and tasks with clear verification targets. |
.opencode/specs/skilled-agent-orchestration/042-sk-deep-research-review-improvement-2/005-agent-improver-deep-loop-alignment/scratch/codex-gpt54-deep-research.md:2834:.opencode/specs/skilled-agent-orchestration/042-sk-deep-research-review-improvement-2/002-semantic-coverage-graph/spec.md:363:- **SC-001**: The phase documents the coverage graph as the fourth graph system in the Spec Kit Memory stack and clearly reuses existing graph patterns.
.opencode/specs/skilled-agent-orchestration/042-sk-deep-research-review-improvement-2/005-agent-improver-deep-loop-alignment/scratch/codex-gpt54-deep-research.md:2835:.opencode/specs/skilled-agent-orchestration/042-sk-deep-research-review-improvement-2/002-semantic-coverage-graph/spec.md:365:- **SC-003**: Research and review graph ontologies are fully specified, including kinds, relations, initial weight estimates, metadata, convergence metrics, and the requirement to calibrate weights during implementation.
.opencode/specs/skilled-agent-orchestration/042-sk-deep-research-review-improvement-2/005-agent-improver-deep-loop-alignment/scratch/codex-gpt54-deep-research.md:2836:.opencode/specs/skilled-agent-orchestration/042-sk-deep-research-review-improvement-2/002-semantic-coverage-graph/spec.md:367:- **SC-005**: The reducer integration path explains the reducer/MCP contract, when graph upsert happens, when convergence is queried, and how fallback authority works.
.opencode/specs/skilled-agent-orchestration/042-sk-deep-research-review-improvement-2/005-agent-improver-deep-loop-alignment/scratch/codex-gpt54-deep-research.md:2837:.opencode/specs/skilled-agent-orchestration/042-sk-deep-research-review-improvement-2/002-semantic-coverage-graph/spec.md:369:- **SC-007**: Graph-aware convergence is explicitly additive to Phase 001 runtime truth rather than a competing decision channel.
.opencode/specs/skilled-agent-orchestration/042-sk-deep-research-review-improvement-2/005-agent-improver-deep-loop-alignment/scratch/codex-gpt54-deep-research.md:2838:.opencode/specs/skilled-agent-orchestration/042-sk-deep-research-review-improvement-2/002-semantic-coverage-graph/spec.md:374:1. **Given** a research packet with low novelty and high question coverage, **when** `deep_loop_graph_convergence` runs, **then** it can support legal STOP only if claims are verified and contradictions are within tolerance.
.opencode/specs/skilled-agent-orchestration/042-sk-deep-research-review-improvement-2/005-agent-improver-deep-loop-alignment/scratch/codex-gpt54-deep-research.md:2839:.opencode/specs/skilled-agent-orchestration/042-sk-deep-research-review-improvement-2/002-semantic-coverage-graph/spec.md:375:2. **Given** a research packet with low novelty but uncovered questions, **when** convergence is evaluated, **then** the decision must be `STOP_BLOCKED` and the blockers must name the uncovered questions.
.opencode/specs/skilled-agent-orchestration/042-sk-deep-research-review-improvement-2/005-agent-improver-deep-loop-alignment/scratch/codex-gpt54-deep-research.md:2840:.opencode/specs/skilled-agent-orchestration/042-sk-deep-research-review-improvement-2/002-semantic-coverage-graph/spec.md:376:3. **Given** a review packet with unresolved contradictory findings, **when** convergence is evaluated, **then** legal STOP is blocked even if iteration novelty has fallen.
.opencode/specs/skilled-agent-orchestration/042-sk-deep-research-review-improvement-2/005-agent-improver-deep-loop-alignment/scratch/codex-gpt54-deep-research.md:2841:.opencode/specs/skilled-agent-orchestration/042-sk-deep-research-review-improvement-2/002-semantic-coverage-graph/spec.md:377:4. **Given** the reducer replays the same `graphEvents` twice, **when** `deep_loop_graph_upsert` runs twice, **then** graph state remains idempotent and weights stay clamped.
.opencode/specs/skilled-agent-orchestration/042-sk-deep-research-review-improvement-2/005-agent-improver-deep-loop-alignment/scratch/codex-gpt54-deep-research.md:2844:.opencode/specs/skilled-agent-orchestration/042-sk-deep-research-review-improvement-2/003-wave-executor/implementation-summary.md:3:description: "Orchestrator-managed parallel wave execution for deep research and deep review: fan-out/join proof, deterministic segmentation, activation gates, keyed merge, and 97 tests."
.opencode/specs/skilled-agent-orchestration/042-sk-deep-research-review-improvement-2/005-agent-improver-deep-loop-alignment/scratch/codex-gpt54-deep-research.md:2845:.opencode/specs/skilled-agent-orchestration/042-sk-deep-research-review-improvement-2/003-wave-executor/implementation-summary.md:7:  - "wave executor"
.opencode/specs/skilled-agent-orchestration/042-sk-deep-research-review-improvement-2/005-agent-improver-deep-loop-alignment/scratch/codex-gpt54-deep-research.md:2846:.opencode/specs/skilled-agent-orchestration/042-sk-deep-research-review-improvement-2/003-wave-executor/implementation-summary.md:25:| **Spec Folder** | 042-sk-deep-research-review-improvement-2/003-wave-executor |
.opencode/specs/skilled-agent-orchestration/042-sk-deep-research-review-improvement-2/005-agent-improver-deep-loop-alignment/scratch/codex-gpt54-deep-research.md:2847:.opencode/specs/skilled-agent-orchestration/042-sk-deep-research-review-improvement-2/003-wave-executor/implementation-summary.md:35:Deep research and deep review can now handle very large targets through orchestrator-managed parallel wave execution without abandoning the LEAF-worker model. The implementation adds deterministic segmentation, packet-local coordination, segment-level convergence, and auditable merge behavior on top of the Phase 002 coverage-graph foundation.
.opencode/specs/skilled-agent-orchestration/042-sk-deep-research-review-improvement-2/005-agent-improver-deep-loop-alignment/scratch/codex-gpt54-deep-research.md:2848:.opencode/specs/skilled-agent-orchestration/042-sk-deep-research-review-improvement-2/003-wave-executor/implementation-summary.md:39:Workflow fan-out/join capability was proven through helper-module orchestration that safely performs parallel dispatch and join outside the YAML workflow surface. This was the hard prerequisite that blocked all wave-mode runtime work.
.opencode/specs/skilled-agent-orchestration/042-sk-deep-research-review-improvement-2/005-agent-improver-deep-loop-alignment/scratch/codex-gpt54-deep-research.md:2849:.opencode/specs/skilled-agent-orchestration/042-sk-deep-research-review-improvement-2/003-wave-executor/implementation-summary.md:43:The v1 deterministic heuristic segmentation produces reproducible segment identity and ordering for both review files and research domains. Review targets get `hotspot-inventory.json` with file ranking, directory clusters, and coverage priorities. Research targets get `domain-ledger.json` with source domains, authority levels, and cluster assignments. Segment-plan versioning and activation-gate configuration are exposed through strategy and config surfaces.
.opencode/specs/skilled-agent-orchestration/042-sk-deep-research-review-improvement-2/005-agent-improver-deep-loop-alignment/scratch/codex-gpt54-deep-research.md:2850:.opencode/specs/skilled-agent-orchestration/042-sk-deep-research-review-improvement-2/003-wave-executor/implementation-summary.md:47:The v2 graph-enhanced segmentation wraps Phase 002 graph signals for per-segment convergence, pruning, and promotion decisions. The shared wave lifecycle manager handles fan-out, join, prune, promote, and merge transitions. The reducer-owned `board.json` tracks conflicts, dedupe, and promoted findings, while `dashboard.md` is derived and never directly maintained.
.opencode/specs/skilled-agent-orchestration/042-sk-deep-research-review-improvement-2/005-agent-improver-deep-loop-alignment/scratch/codex-gpt54-deep-research.md:2851:.opencode/specs/skilled-agent-orchestration/042-sk-deep-research-review-improvement-2/003-wave-executor/implementation-summary.md:55:The JSONL merge contract uses explicit key ordering by `sessionId`, `generation`, `segment`, `wave`, and `findingId` rather than append order. Segment provenance, dedupe, and conflict metadata survive repeated merges. Segment JSONL lineage is deterministic and auditable.
.opencode/specs/skilled-agent-orchestration/042-sk-deep-research-review-improvement-2/005-agent-improver-deep-loop-alignment/scratch/codex-gpt54-deep-research.md:2852:.opencode/specs/skilled-agent-orchestration/042-sk-deep-research-review-improvement-2/003-wave-executor/implementation-summary.md:63:Implementation proceeded through 3 sub-phases: fan-out/join prerequisite proof, heuristic segmentation with prepass artifacts, and graph-enhanced segmentation with lifecycle integration. 11 files were touched (9 new), adding approximately 3,300 lines. 97 tests cover planner determinism, lifecycle transitions, keyed merge provenance, resume safety, and default-path regression.
.opencode/specs/skilled-agent-orchestration/042-sk-deep-research-review-improvement-2/005-agent-improver-deep-loop-alignment/scratch/codex-gpt54-deep-research.md:2853:.opencode/specs/skilled-agent-orchestration/042-sk-deep-research-review-improvement-2/003-wave-executor/implementation-summary.md:73:| Helper-module orchestration for fan-out/join | The YAML workflow engine has no native parallel dispatch, so orchestration logic lives in CJS helpers |
.opencode/specs/skilled-agent-orchestration/042-sk-deep-research-review-improvement-2/005-agent-improver-deep-loop-alignment/scratch/codex-gpt54-deep-research.md:2854:.opencode/specs/skilled-agent-orchestration/042-sk-deep-research-review-improvement-2/003-wave-executor/implementation-summary.md:74:| Orchestrator-layer parallelism, not LEAF-agent spawning | Workers stay LEAF; orchestration handles segmentation, fan-out, pruning, promotion, and merge |
.opencode/specs/skilled-agent-orchestration/042-sk-deep-research-review-improvement-2/005-agent-improver-deep-loop-alignment/scratch/codex-gpt54-deep-research.md:2855:.opencode/specs/skilled-agent-orchestration/042-sk-deep-research-review-improvement-2/003-wave-executor/implementation-summary.md:76:| Deterministic keyed merge by explicit identifiers | Append-order dependence would break replay and produce non-deterministic merged outputs |
.opencode/specs/skilled-agent-orchestration/042-sk-deep-research-review-improvement-2/005-agent-improver-deep-loop-alignment/scratch/codex-gpt54-deep-research.md:2856:.opencode/specs/skilled-agent-orchestration/042-sk-deep-research-review-improvement-2/003-wave-executor/implementation-summary.md:77:| Activation gates with explicit large-target thresholds | Prevents wave overhead for small targets where single-stream execution is already optimal |
.opencode/specs/skilled-agent-orchestration/042-sk-deep-research-review-improvement-2/005-agent-improver-deep-loop-alignment/scratch/codex-gpt54-deep-research.md:2857:.opencode/specs/skilled-agent-orchestration/042-sk-deep-research-review-improvement-2/003-wave-executor/implementation-summary.md:89:| Activation gates prevent wave mode for small targets | PASS |
.opencode/specs/skilled-agent-orchestration/042-sk-deep-research-review-improvement-2/005-agent-improver-deep-loop-alignment/scratch/codex-gpt54-deep-research.md:2858:.opencode/specs/skilled-agent-orchestration/042-sk-deep-research-review-improvement-2/003-wave-executor/implementation-summary.md:101:1. **V2 graph-enhanced segmentation depends on Phase 002 graph readiness.** If graph convergence signals are unavailable, segmentation falls back to v1 heuristic mode.
.opencode/specs/skilled-agent-orchestration/042-sk-deep-research-review-improvement-2/005-agent-improver-deep-loop-alignment/scratch/codex-gpt54-deep-research.md:2859:.opencode/specs/skilled-agent-orchestration/042-sk-deep-research-review-improvement-2/003-wave-executor/plan.md:3:description: "Deliver orchestrator-managed wave execution for deep research and deep review by adding segment planning, coordination-board tracking, and deterministic merge behavior on top of the Phase 002 graph substrate."
.opencode/specs/skilled-agent-orchestration/042-sk-deep-research-review-improvement-2/005-agent-improver-deep-loop-alignment/scratch/codex-gpt54-deep-research.md:2860:.opencode/specs/skilled-agent-orchestration/042-sk-deep-research-review-improvement-2/003-wave-executor/plan.md:7:  - "wave executor"
.opencode/specs/skilled-agent-orchestration/042-sk-deep-research-review-improvement-2/005-agent-improver-deep-loop-alignment/scratch/codex-gpt54-deep-research.md:2861:.opencode/specs/skilled-agent-orchestration/042-sk-deep-research-review-improvement-2/003-wave-executor/plan.md:34:This phase scales deep research and deep review by adding orchestrator-managed wave execution rather than agent-managed spawning. The delivery order is intentionally front-loaded around the biggest risk: first prove workflow fan-out/join capability on top of the current YAML engine, then ship v1 heuristic segmentation plus prepass artifacts, then layer v2 graph-enhanced segmentation once Phase 002 is operational, and only then harden merge and resume behavior for broader activation.
.opencode/specs/skilled-agent-orchestration/042-sk-deep-research-review-improvement-2/005-agent-improver-deep-loop-alignment/scratch/codex-gpt54-deep-research.md:2862:.opencode/specs/skilled-agent-orchestration/042-sk-deep-research-review-improvement-2/003-wave-executor/plan.md:45:- [x] Phase 002 graph convergence is identified as the convergence authority for segments.
.opencode/specs/skilled-agent-orchestration/042-sk-deep-research-review-improvement-2/005-agent-improver-deep-loop-alignment/scratch/codex-gpt54-deep-research.md:2863:.opencode/specs/skilled-agent-orchestration/042-sk-deep-research-review-improvement-2/003-wave-executor/plan.md:53:- [x] `hotspot-inventory.json` and `domain-ledger.json` are defined as mandatory prepass artifacts.
.opencode/specs/skilled-agent-orchestration/042-sk-deep-research-review-improvement-2/005-agent-improver-deep-loop-alignment/scratch/codex-gpt54-deep-research.md:2864:.opencode/specs/skilled-agent-orchestration/042-sk-deep-research-review-improvement-2/003-wave-executor/plan.md:58:- [x] Tests prove planner determinism, lifecycle correctness, merge idempotence, and resume behavior.
.opencode/specs/skilled-agent-orchestration/042-sk-deep-research-review-improvement-2/005-agent-improver-deep-loop-alignment/scratch/codex-gpt54-deep-research.md:2865:.opencode/specs/skilled-agent-orchestration/042-sk-deep-research-review-improvement-2/003-wave-executor/plan.md:68:Segmented fan-out orchestration with packet-local state, reducer-owned execution ledgering, and deterministic keyed merge.
.opencode/specs/skilled-agent-orchestration/042-sk-deep-research-review-improvement-2/005-agent-improver-deep-loop-alignment/scratch/codex-gpt54-deep-research.md:2866:.opencode/specs/skilled-agent-orchestration/042-sk-deep-research-review-improvement-2/003-wave-executor/plan.md:72:- **Fan-out/join proof layer**: establishes the canonical orchestration path for parallel dispatch and join on top of today's YAML workflow engine.
.opencode/specs/skilled-agent-orchestration/042-sk-deep-research-review-improvement-2/005-agent-improver-deep-loop-alignment/scratch/codex-gpt54-deep-research.md:2867:.opencode/specs/skilled-agent-orchestration/042-sk-deep-research-review-improvement-2/003-wave-executor/plan.md:74:- **Decomposition prepass**: emits `hotspot-inventory.json` for review and `domain-ledger.json` for research before any wave dispatch.
.opencode/specs/skilled-agent-orchestration/042-sk-deep-research-review-improvement-2/005-agent-improver-deep-loop-alignment/scratch/codex-gpt54-deep-research.md:2868:.opencode/specs/skilled-agent-orchestration/042-sk-deep-research-review-improvement-2/003-wave-executor/plan.md:75:- **Wave lifecycle manager**: owns fan-out, join, prune, promote, merge, and resume transitions.
.opencode/specs/skilled-agent-orchestration/042-sk-deep-research-review-improvement-2/005-agent-improver-deep-loop-alignment/scratch/codex-gpt54-deep-research.md:2869:.opencode/specs/skilled-agent-orchestration/042-sk-deep-research-review-improvement-2/003-wave-executor/plan.md:76:- **Wave convergence layer**: wraps Phase 002 graph signals for per-segment decisions.
.opencode/specs/skilled-agent-orchestration/042-sk-deep-research-review-improvement-2/005-agent-improver-deep-loop-alignment/scratch/codex-gpt54-deep-research.md:2870:.opencode/specs/skilled-agent-orchestration/042-sk-deep-research-review-improvement-2/003-wave-executor/plan.md:77:- **Coordination board**: keeps `board.json` as the canonical execution ledger and `dashboard.md` as a derived human-readable render.
.opencode/specs/skilled-agent-orchestration/042-sk-deep-research-review-improvement-2/005-agent-improver-deep-loop-alignment/scratch/codex-gpt54-deep-research.md:2871:.opencode/specs/skilled-agent-orchestration/042-sk-deep-research-review-improvement-2/003-wave-executor/plan.md:78:- **Segment state and merge layer**: keeps segment JSONL replayable and mergeable into the main lineage.
.opencode/specs/skilled-agent-orchestration/042-sk-deep-research-review-improvement-2/005-agent-improver-deep-loop-alignment/scratch/codex-gpt54-deep-research.md:2872:.opencode/specs/skilled-agent-orchestration/042-sk-deep-research-review-improvement-2/003-wave-executor/plan.md:85:  -> emit hotspot-inventory.json or domain-ledger.json
.opencode/specs/skilled-agent-orchestration/042-sk-deep-research-review-improvement-2/005-agent-improver-deep-loop-alignment/scratch/codex-gpt54-deep-research.md:2873:.opencode/specs/skilled-agent-orchestration/042-sk-deep-research-review-improvement-2/003-wave-executor/plan.md:89:  -> dispatch N parallel LEAF iterations
.opencode/specs/skilled-agent-orchestration/042-sk-deep-research-review-improvement-2/005-agent-improver-deep-loop-alignment/scratch/codex-gpt54-deep-research.md:2874:.opencode/specs/skilled-agent-orchestration/042-sk-deep-research-review-improvement-2/003-wave-executor/plan.md:90:  -> evaluate each segment with graph-backed convergence
.opencode/specs/skilled-agent-orchestration/042-sk-deep-research-review-improvement-2/005-agent-improver-deep-loop-alignment/scratch/codex-gpt54-deep-research.md:2875:.opencode/specs/skilled-agent-orchestration/042-sk-deep-research-review-improvement-2/003-wave-executor/plan.md:93:  -> join segment waves
.opencode/specs/skilled-agent-orchestration/042-sk-deep-research-review-improvement-2/005-agent-improver-deep-loop-alignment/scratch/codex-gpt54-deep-research.md:2876:.opencode/specs/skilled-agent-orchestration/042-sk-deep-research-review-improvement-2/003-wave-executor/plan.md:107:**Why first**: Wave execution is blocked until the system can prove a safe fan-out/join path. The current YAML engine has no native parallel dispatch, so this proof must land before any segmentation or merge design can be treated as buildable.
.opencode/specs/skilled-agent-orchestration/042-sk-deep-research-review-improvement-2/005-agent-improver-deep-loop-alignment/scratch/codex-gpt54-deep-research.md:2877:.opencode/specs/skilled-agent-orchestration/042-sk-deep-research-review-improvement-2/003-wave-executor/plan.md:110:- `.opencode/skill/system-spec-kit/scripts/lib/wave-lifecycle.cjs`

.opencode/specs/skilled-agent-orchestration/042-sk-deep-research-review-improvement-2/005-agent-improver-deep-loop-alignment/scratch/codex-gpt54-deep-research.md:2882:.opencode/specs/skilled-agent-orchestration/042-sk-deep-research-review-improvement-2/003-wave-executor/plan.md:141:- Prove `hotspot-inventory.json` and `domain-ledger.json` are emitted before dispatch.
.opencode/specs/skilled-agent-orchestration/042-sk-deep-research-review-improvement-2/005-agent-improver-deep-loop-alignment/scratch/codex-gpt54-deep-research.md:2883:.opencode/specs/skilled-agent-orchestration/042-sk-deep-research-review-improvement-2/003-wave-executor/plan.md:142:- Prove segment IDs and board row IDs remain stable across replay.

.opencode/specs/skilled-agent-orchestration/042-sk-deep-research-review-improvement-2/005-agent-improver-deep-loop-alignment/scratch/codex-gpt54-deep-research.md:2886:.opencode/specs/skilled-agent-orchestration/042-sk-deep-research-review-improvement-2/003-wave-executor/plan.md:171:**Why fourth**: Merge correctness, join safety, and resume behavior are the operational guardrails that make wave mode safe to trust after the prerequisite and segmentation layers are in place.
.opencode/specs/skilled-agent-orchestration/042-sk-deep-research-review-improvement-2/005-agent-improver-deep-loop-alignment/scratch/codex-gpt54-deep-research.md:2887:.opencode/specs/skilled-agent-orchestration/042-sk-deep-research-review-improvement-2/003-wave-executor/plan.md:174:- `.opencode/skill/system-spec-kit/scripts/lib/wave-lifecycle.cjs`

.opencode/specs/skilled-agent-orchestration/042-sk-deep-research-review-improvement-2/005-agent-improver-deep-loop-alignment/scratch/codex-gpt54-deep-research.md:2898:.opencode/specs/skilled-agent-orchestration/042-sk-deep-research-review-improvement-2/003-wave-executor/plan.md:221:| Phase 001 resume and journal model | Internal | Green | Segment-level recovery would become inconsistent with existing runtime truth. |
.opencode/specs/skilled-agent-orchestration/042-sk-deep-research-review-improvement-2/005-agent-improver-deep-loop-alignment/scratch/codex-gpt54-deep-research.md:2899:.opencode/specs/skilled-agent-orchestration/042-sk-deep-research-review-improvement-2/003-wave-executor/plan.md:223:| Packet-local artifact discipline | Internal | Green | Segment, `board.json`, and merge outputs would become hard to replay or merge safely. |
.opencode/specs/skilled-agent-orchestration/042-sk-deep-research-review-improvement-2/005-agent-improver-deep-loop-alignment/scratch/codex-gpt54-deep-research.md:2900:.opencode/specs/skilled-agent-orchestration/042-sk-deep-research-review-improvement-2/003-wave-executor/plan.md:231:- **Trigger**: Fan-out/join proof fails, wave execution produces unstable segments, incorrect merge results, or leaks complexity into default single-stream runs.
.opencode/specs/skilled-agent-orchestration/042-sk-deep-research-review-improvement-2/005-agent-improver-deep-loop-alignment/scratch/codex-gpt54-deep-research.md:2901:.opencode/specs/skilled-agent-orchestration/042-sk-deep-research-review-improvement-2/003-wave-executor/plan.md:232:- **Procedure**: Disable wave mode in config or workflow routing, keep segment-planning helpers uninvoked, fall back to sequential execution, and preserve the single-stream runtime while prerequisite or merge issues are corrected under test.
.opencode/specs/skilled-agent-orchestration/042-sk-deep-research-review-improvement-2/005-agent-improver-deep-loop-alignment/scratch/codex-gpt54-deep-research.md:2902:.opencode/specs/skilled-agent-orchestration/042-sk-deep-research-review-improvement-2/003-wave-executor/plan.md:233:- **Safety Note**: Rollback must keep prepass artifacts and segment artifacts readable for debugging even when wave mode is disabled.
.opencode/specs/skilled-agent-orchestration/042-sk-deep-research-review-improvement-2/005-agent-improver-deep-loop-alignment/scratch/codex-gpt54-deep-research.md:2903:.opencode/specs/skilled-agent-orchestration/042-sk-deep-research-review-improvement-2/003-wave-executor/plan.md:243:| Phase 3a heuristic segmentation and prepass artifacts | Medium | Review-side work is concrete, but research still needs a new discovery ledger surface. |
.opencode/specs/skilled-agent-orchestration/042-sk-deep-research-review-improvement-2/005-agent-improver-deep-loop-alignment/scratch/codex-gpt54-deep-research.md:2904:.opencode/specs/skilled-agent-orchestration/042-sk-deep-research-review-improvement-2/003-wave-executor/plan.md:244:| Phase 3b graph-enhanced segmentation | Medium | Depends on Phase 002 coverage graph being operational and stable enough to refine v1 safely. |
.opencode/specs/skilled-agent-orchestration/042-sk-deep-research-review-improvement-2/005-agent-improver-deep-loop-alignment/scratch/codex-gpt54-deep-research.md:2905:.opencode/specs/skilled-agent-orchestration/042-sk-deep-research-review-improvement-2/003-wave-executor/plan.md:245:| Phase 3c lifecycle, merge, and recovery hardening | Medium-High | Join semantics, keyed merge guarantees, and resume safety all need integration and regression coverage. |
.opencode/specs/skilled-agent-orchestration/042-sk-deep-research-review-improvement-2/005-agent-improver-deep-loop-alignment/scratch/codex-gpt54-deep-research.md:2906:.opencode/specs/skilled-agent-orchestration/042-sk-deep-research-review-improvement-2/003-wave-executor/spec.md:3:description: "Define orchestrator-managed parallel wave execution for deep research and deep review so large targets can be segmented, converged, and merged without turning LEAF agents into sub-agent managers."
.opencode/specs/skilled-agent-orchestration/042-sk-deep-research-review-improvement-2/005-agent-improver-deep-loop-alignment/scratch/codex-gpt54-deep-research.md:2907:.opencode/specs/skilled-agent-orchestration/042-sk-deep-research-review-improvement-2/003-wave-executor/spec.md:6:  - "wave executor"
.opencode/specs/skilled-agent-orchestration/042-sk-deep-research-review-improvement-2/005-agent-improver-deep-loop-alignment/scratch/codex-gpt54-deep-research.md:2908:.opencode/specs/skilled-agent-orchestration/042-sk-deep-research-review-improvement-2/003-wave-executor/spec.md:9:  - "parallel deep loop"
.opencode/specs/skilled-agent-orchestration/042-sk-deep-research-review-improvement-2/005-agent-improver-deep-loop-alignment/scratch/codex-gpt54-deep-research.md:2909:.opencode/specs/skilled-agent-orchestration/042-sk-deep-research-review-improvement-2/003-wave-executor/spec.md:22:Phase 003 adds orchestrator-managed parallel wave execution so deep research and deep review can handle very large targets without abandoning the LEAF-worker model. It formalizes deterministic segmentation, packet-local coordination, segment-level convergence, and auditable merge behavior on top of the coverage-graph foundation from Phase 002.
.opencode/specs/skilled-agent-orchestration/042-sk-deep-research-review-improvement-2/005-agent-improver-deep-loop-alignment/scratch/codex-gpt54-deep-research.md:2910:.opencode/specs/skilled-agent-orchestration/042-sk-deep-research-review-improvement-2/003-wave-executor/spec.md:24:Critical prerequisite: workflow fan-out/join capability must be proven before wave execution can be built. The current YAML workflow engine has no native parallel dispatch, so this phase must first establish either helper-module orchestration that safely performs fan-out/join outside the YAML surface or an explicit engine extension that makes parallel dispatch and join first-class.
.opencode/specs/skilled-agent-orchestration/042-sk-deep-research-review-improvement-2/005-agent-improver-deep-loop-alignment/scratch/codex-gpt54-deep-research.md:2911:.opencode/specs/skilled-agent-orchestration/042-sk-deep-research-review-improvement-2/003-wave-executor/spec.md:40:| **Successor** | `004-offline-loop-optimizer` |
.opencode/specs/skilled-agent-orchestration/042-sk-deep-research-review-improvement-2/005-agent-improver-deep-loop-alignment/scratch/codex-gpt54-deep-research.md:2912:.opencode/specs/skilled-agent-orchestration/042-sk-deep-research-review-improvement-2/003-wave-executor/spec.md:41:| **Handoff Criteria** | Phase 004 can replay wave runs as deterministic, segment-aware traces with stable board and merge artifacts. |
.opencode/specs/skilled-agent-orchestration/042-sk-deep-research-review-improvement-2/005-agent-improver-deep-loop-alignment/scratch/codex-gpt54-deep-research.md:2913:.opencode/specs/skilled-agent-orchestration/042-sk-deep-research-review-improvement-2/003-wave-executor/spec.md:45:**Phase Context**: This phase adds orchestrator-managed parallel batches on top of the coverage-graph substrate from Phase 002. The goal is scale without architectural drift: the workers stay LEAF, while orchestration logic handles segmentation, fan-out, pruning, promotion, and merge.
.opencode/specs/skilled-agent-orchestration/042-sk-deep-research-review-improvement-2/005-agent-improver-deep-loop-alignment/scratch/codex-gpt54-deep-research.md:2914:.opencode/specs/skilled-agent-orchestration/042-sk-deep-research-review-improvement-2/003-wave-executor/spec.md:49:- Phase 002 graph tools, especially graph-backed convergence and gap detection.
.opencode/specs/skilled-agent-orchestration/042-sk-deep-research-review-improvement-2/005-agent-improver-deep-loop-alignment/scratch/codex-gpt54-deep-research.md:2915:.opencode/specs/skilled-agent-orchestration/042-sk-deep-research-review-improvement-2/003-wave-executor/spec.md:50:- Phase 001 stop reasons, journals, resume semantics, and reducer-owned sections.
.opencode/specs/skilled-agent-orchestration/042-sk-deep-research-review-improvement-2/005-agent-improver-deep-loop-alignment/scratch/codex-gpt54-deep-research.md:2916:.opencode/specs/skilled-agent-orchestration/042-sk-deep-research-review-improvement-2/003-wave-executor/spec.md:54:- Proven workflow fan-out/join path before any wave-mode runtime wiring proceeds.
.opencode/specs/skilled-agent-orchestration/042-sk-deep-research-review-improvement-2/005-agent-improver-deep-loop-alignment/scratch/codex-gpt54-deep-research.md:2917:.opencode/specs/skilled-agent-orchestration/042-sk-deep-research-review-improvement-2/003-wave-executor/spec.md:56:- v2 graph/cluster-enhanced segmentation using the Phase 002 coverage graph once the graph surfaces are operational.
.opencode/specs/skilled-agent-orchestration/042-sk-deep-research-review-improvement-2/005-agent-improver-deep-loop-alignment/scratch/codex-gpt54-deep-research.md:2918:.opencode/specs/skilled-agent-orchestration/042-sk-deep-research-review-improvement-2/003-wave-executor/spec.md:58:- Mandatory decomposition prepass artifacts: `hotspot-inventory.json` for review and `domain-ledger.json` for research.
.opencode/specs/skilled-agent-orchestration/042-sk-deep-research-review-improvement-2/005-agent-improver-deep-loop-alignment/scratch/codex-gpt54-deep-research.md:2919:.opencode/specs/skilled-agent-orchestration/042-sk-deep-research-review-improvement-2/003-wave-executor/spec.md:59:- Reducer-owned `board.json` execution ledger plus derived human-readable `dashboard.md` render.
.opencode/specs/skilled-agent-orchestration/042-sk-deep-research-review-improvement-2/005-agent-improver-deep-loop-alignment/scratch/codex-gpt54-deep-research.md:2920:.opencode/specs/skilled-agent-orchestration/042-sk-deep-research-review-improvement-2/003-wave-executor/spec.md:71:The deep-loop products are currently optimized for one iteration stream at a time. That works for moderate targets, but it becomes inefficient and hard to govern once a review scope crosses 1000 files or a research scope spans dozens of domains. Without a structured wave executor, operators must either accept slow sequential progress or invent ad hoc parallelism that risks duplicated work, conflicting findings, and unmergeable state. The problem is amplified by the current YAML workflow engine, which has no native parallel dispatch or join capability today.
.opencode/specs/skilled-agent-orchestration/042-sk-deep-research-review-improvement-2/005-agent-improver-deep-loop-alignment/scratch/codex-gpt54-deep-research.md:2921:.opencode/specs/skilled-agent-orchestration/042-sk-deep-research-review-improvement-2/003-wave-executor/spec.md:75:Define an orchestrator-layer wave execution model that segments large review and research targets into bounded parallel batches, tracks each segment through convergence and promotion, and merges the results back into one auditable packet without changing the LEAF-worker rule.
.opencode/specs/skilled-agent-orchestration/042-sk-deep-research-review-improvement-2/005-agent-improver-deep-loop-alignment/scratch/codex-gpt54-deep-research.md:2922:.opencode/specs/skilled-agent-orchestration/042-sk-deep-research-review-improvement-2/003-wave-executor/spec.md:85:- Prove workflow fan-out/join capability before wave execution is wired into deep research or deep review.
.opencode/specs/skilled-agent-orchestration/042-sk-deep-research-review-improvement-2/005-agent-improver-deep-loop-alignment/scratch/codex-gpt54-deep-research.md:2923:.opencode/specs/skilled-agent-orchestration/042-sk-deep-research-review-improvement-2/003-wave-executor/spec.md:87:- Add v2 graph/cluster-enhanced segmentation that refines decomposition using the Phase 002 coverage graph once it is operational.
.opencode/specs/skilled-agent-orchestration/042-sk-deep-research-review-improvement-2/005-agent-improver-deep-loop-alignment/scratch/codex-gpt54-deep-research.md:2924:.opencode/specs/skilled-agent-orchestration/042-sk-deep-research-review-improvement-2/003-wave-executor/spec.md:88:- Define wave lifecycle steps: plan, fan-out, prune, promote, and merge.
.opencode/specs/skilled-agent-orchestration/042-sk-deep-research-review-improvement-2/005-agent-improver-deep-loop-alignment/scratch/codex-gpt54-deep-research.md:2925:.opencode/specs/skilled-agent-orchestration/042-sk-deep-research-review-improvement-2/003-wave-executor/spec.md:89:- Introduce machine-first, reducer-owned packet-local coordination tracking with `board.json` as the canonical execution ledger and `dashboard.md` as a derived human-readable render.
.opencode/specs/skilled-agent-orchestration/042-sk-deep-research-review-improvement-2/005-agent-improver-deep-loop-alignment/scratch/codex-gpt54-deep-research.md:2926:.opencode/specs/skilled-agent-orchestration/042-sk-deep-research-review-improvement-2/003-wave-executor/spec.md:90:- Define mandatory decomposition prepass artifacts: `hotspot-inventory.json` for review and `domain-ledger.json` for research.
.opencode/specs/skilled-agent-orchestration/042-sk-deep-research-review-improvement-2/005-agent-improver-deep-loop-alignment/scratch/codex-gpt54-deep-research.md:2927:.opencode/specs/skilled-agent-orchestration/042-sk-deep-research-review-improvement-2/003-wave-executor/spec.md:91:- Define segment-local JSONL or state artifacts and deterministic merge rules into the main packet lineage using explicit keys: `sessionId`, `generation`, `segment`, `wave`, and `findingId`.
.opencode/specs/skilled-agent-orchestration/042-sk-deep-research-review-improvement-2/005-agent-improver-deep-loop-alignment/scratch/codex-gpt54-deep-research.md:2928:.opencode/specs/skilled-agent-orchestration/042-sk-deep-research-review-improvement-2/003-wave-executor/spec.md:92:- Apply Phase 002 graph convergence per segment so pruning and promotion decisions are evidence-backed.
.opencode/specs/skilled-agent-orchestration/042-sk-deep-research-review-improvement-2/005-agent-improver-deep-loop-alignment/scratch/codex-gpt54-deep-research.md:2929:.opencode/specs/skilled-agent-orchestration/042-sk-deep-research-review-improvement-2/003-wave-executor/spec.md:93:- Add activation gates so wave execution only activates for review scopes with at least 1000 files plus hotspot spread, or research scopes with at least 50 domains plus cluster diversity; otherwise the default sequential path remains unchanged.
.opencode/specs/skilled-agent-orchestration/042-sk-deep-research-review-improvement-2/005-agent-improver-deep-loop-alignment/scratch/codex-gpt54-deep-research.md:2930:.opencode/specs/skilled-agent-orchestration/042-sk-deep-research-review-improvement-2/003-wave-executor/spec.md:94:- Add workflow, config, and strategy surfaces for wave-aware execution without changing the default small-target path.
.opencode/specs/skilled-agent-orchestration/042-sk-deep-research-review-improvement-2/005-agent-improver-deep-loop-alignment/scratch/codex-gpt54-deep-research.md:2931:.opencode/specs/skilled-agent-orchestration/042-sk-deep-research-review-improvement-2/003-wave-executor/spec.md:95:- Add tests for lifecycle correctness, segment isolation, merge idempotence, and resume or recovery behavior.
.opencode/specs/skilled-agent-orchestration/042-sk-deep-research-review-improvement-2/005-agent-improver-deep-loop-alignment/scratch/codex-gpt54-deep-research.md:2932:.opencode/specs/skilled-agent-orchestration/042-sk-deep-research-review-improvement-2/003-wave-executor/spec.md:100:- Offline replay optimization, config search, and promotion gates from Phase 004.
.opencode/specs/skilled-agent-orchestration/042-sk-deep-research-review-improvement-2/005-agent-improver-deep-loop-alignment/scratch/codex-gpt54-deep-research.md:2933:.opencode/specs/skilled-agent-orchestration/042-sk-deep-research-review-improvement-2/003-wave-executor/spec.md:108:| `.opencode/skill/system-spec-kit/scripts/lib/wave-segment-planner.cjs` | Create | Shared planner for v1 heuristic segmentation and v2 graph-enhanced review or research segments. |
