    27	# ─────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
    28	user_inputs:
    29	  research_topic: "[RESEARCH_TOPIC] - Topic to investigate deeply. REQUIRED."
    30	  spec_folder: "[SPEC_FOLDER] - Spec folder path. REQUIRED."
    31	  max_iterations: "[MAX_ITERATIONS] - Maximum loop iterations. Default: 10."
    32	  convergence_threshold: "[CONVERGENCE_THRESHOLD] - Stop threshold. Default: 0.05."
    33	
    34	# ─────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
    35	# CONTEXT LOADING
    36	# ─────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
    37	context_loading:
    38	  trigger: "At workflow START, before phase_init"
    39	  purpose: "Load prior research context for the topic and buffer it until strategy.md exists"
    40	  mcp_integration:
    41	    tool: memory_context
    42	    note: "Call MCP tools directly - NEVER through Code Mode"
    43	    parameters: { input: "{research_topic}", mode: "focused", intent: "understand", includeContent: true }
    44	  when_to_skip: ["User says 'skip context' or 'fresh start'"]
    45	  behavior:
    46	    if_context_found: "Store full results as prior_context plus a concise prior_context_summary; inject after strategy.md is created."
    47	    if_no_context: "Set prior_context and prior_context_summary to 'None' and continue."
    48	
    49	# ─────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
    50	# SKILL REFERENCE
    51	# ─────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
    52	skill_reference:
    53	  skill: sk-deep-research
    54	  skill_md: .opencode/skill/sk-deep-research/SKILL.md
    55	  references:
    56	    loop_protocol: .opencode/skill/sk-deep-research/references/loop_protocol.md
    57	    state_format: .opencode/skill/sk-deep-research/references/state_format.md
    58	    convergence: .opencode/skill/sk-deep-research/references/convergence.md
    59	  templates:
    60	    config: .opencode/skill/sk-deep-research/assets/deep_research_config.json
    61	    strategy: .opencode/skill/sk-deep-research/assets/deep_research_strategy.md
    62	
    63	# ─────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
    64	# AGENT CONFIGURATION
    65	# ─────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
    66	agent_config:
    67	  agent: deep-research
    68	  agent_file: ".opencode/agent/deep-research.md"
    69	  # Canonical path. Runtime-specific directories (e.g. .claude/agents/) reference this source.
    70	  model: opus
    71	  leaf_only: true
    72	  tools: [Read, Write, Edit, Bash, Grep, Glob, WebFetch, mcp__cocoindex_code__search]
    73	  mcp_servers: [spec_kit_memory, cocoindex_code]
    74	  tool_call_budget: { target: 8, max: 12 }
    75	
    76	# ─────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
    77	# STATE FILE PATHS
    78	# ─────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
    79	state_paths:
    80	  config: "{spec_folder}/research/deep-research-config.json"
    81	  state_log: "{spec_folder}/research/deep-research-state.jsonl"
    82	  strategy: "{spec_folder}/research/deep-research-strategy.md"
    83	  registry: "{spec_folder}/research/findings-registry.json"
    84	  dashboard: "{spec_folder}/research/deep-research-dashboard.md"
    85	  pause_sentinel: "{spec_folder}/research/.deep-research-pause"
    86	  archive_root: "{spec_folder}/research/archive"
    87	  synthesis_snapshot_pattern: "{spec_folder}/research/synthesis-v{generation}.md"
    88	  iteration_pattern: "{spec_folder}/research/iterations/iteration-{NNN}.md"
    89	  research_output: "{spec_folder}/research/research.md"
    90	
    91	# ─────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
    92	# WORKFLOW
    93	# ─────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
    94	workflow:
    95	
    96	  # ═══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════
    97	  # PHASE 1: INITIALIZATION
    98	  # ═══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════
    99	  phase_init:
   100	    purpose: Create all state files for the research session
   101	    steps:
   102	
   103	      step_preflight_contract:
   104	        action: "Validate required setup bindings and executable workflow contract before any file writes"
   105	        verify:
   106	          - required_values_present: [research_topic, spec_folder, max_iterations, convergence_threshold]
   107	          - spec_folder_is_within: "specs/ or .opencode/specs/ (canonicalize alias roots before validation)"
   108	          - unresolved_placeholders: "FAIL if any user-facing template references placeholders not produced by earlier steps"
   109	          - tool_contract: "FAIL if executable steps reference tools outside the command allowlist"
   110	        on_fail: "Halt with STATUS=FAIL and report the missing binding or unsupported contract reference"
   111	
   112	      step_create_directories:
   113	        action: "Create spec folder and research packet directories if they don't exist"
   114	        command: "mkdir -p {spec_folder}/research/iterations {spec_folder}/research/archive"
   115	
   116	      step_resolve_canonical_names:
   117	        action: "Resolve canonical research packet artifact names before classification"
   118	        inspect_legacy:
   119	          - "{spec_folder}/research/config.json"
   120	          - "{spec_folder}/research/state.jsonl"
   121	          - "{spec_folder}/research/strategy.md"
   122	          - "{spec_folder}/research/dashboard.md"
   123	          - "{spec_folder}/research/.pause"
   124	        migration_policy: "dual-read / single-write for 4 weeks"
   125	        on_legacy_read:
   126	          append_jsonl: '{"type":"event","event":"migration","legacyPath":"{legacy_path}","canonicalPath":"{canonical_path}","timestamp":"{ISO_8601_NOW}"}'
   127	
   128	      step_classify_session:
   129	        action: "Classify the session before writing files"
   130	        inspect:
   131	          - "{spec_folder}/research/deep-research-config.json"
   132	          - "{spec_folder}/research/deep-research-state.jsonl"
   133	          - "{spec_folder}/research/deep-research-strategy.md"
   134	        classify:
   135	          fresh: "None of the three state artifacts exist"
   136	          resume: "Config, JSONL, and strategy all exist and agree on topic/spec folder"
   137	          completed-session: "Resume artifacts exist and config.status == 'complete'"
   138	          invalid-state: "Any partial, missing, or contradictory combination"
   139	        outputs:
   140	          - session_state: "fresh | resume | completed-session | invalid-state"
   141	        on_resume:
   142	          log: "Auto-resume: state artifacts are complete and consistent. Continue the same lineage (sessionId unchanged, generation unchanged, no archive)."
   143	          append_jsonl: '{"type":"event","event":"resumed","mode":"research","sessionId":"{session_id}","parentSessionId":"{session_id}","lineageMode":"resume","continuedFromRun":{iteration_count},"generation":{generation},"archivedPath":null,"timestamp":"{ISO_8601_NOW}"}'
   144	          skip_to: phase_loop
   145	        on_restart:
   146	          action: "Archive the current research/ tree under research_archive/{timestamp}/ and start a new lineage segment with a fresh sessionId and generation+1."
   147	          archive: "{spec_folder}/research -> {spec_folder}/research_archive/{timestamp_slug}"
   148	          set:
   149	            lineage_mode: "restart"
   150	            parent_session_id: "{prior_session_id}"
   151	            generation: "{prior_generation + 1}"
   152	          append_jsonl: '{"type":"event","event":"restarted","mode":"research","sessionId":"{session_id}","parentSessionId":"{prior_session_id}","lineageMode":"restart","generation":{generation},"archivedPath":"{spec_folder}/research_archive/{timestamp_slug}","timestamp":"{ISO_8601_NOW}"}'
   153	          skip_to: step_create_config
   154	        note_deferred_branches: "fork and completed-continue are deferred and no longer runtime-supported in this release. The reducer still reads `lineageMode` from config for dashboards and analysis, but only `new`, `resume`, and `restart` are live. See sk-deep-research/references/loop_protocol.md §Lifecycle Branch Contract for the one-session contract."
   155	        on_completed_session:
   156	          log: "Prior session already completed. Either archive the completed research/ tree and start a fresh session, or jump straight to synthesis with the existing artifacts."
   157	          skip_to: phase_synthesis
   158	        on_invalid_state:
   159	          halt: true
   160	          message: "Existing deep-research state is incomplete or contradictory. Repair or archive the invalid research packet before continuing."
   161	        on_fresh:
   162	          action: "Proceed with a new session"
   163	
   164	      step_create_config:
   165	        action: "Create deep-research-config.json from template"
   166	        template: .opencode/skill/sk-deep-research/assets/deep_research_config.json
   167	        populate:
   168	          topic: "{research_topic}"
   169	          maxIterations: "{max_iterations}"
   170	          convergenceThreshold: "{convergence_threshold}"
   171	          stuckThreshold: 3
   172	          maxDurationMinutes: 120
   173	          specFolder: "{spec_folder}"
   174	          createdAt: "{ISO_8601_NOW}"
   175	          status: "initialized"
   176	          executionMode: "auto"
   177	          lineage.sessionId: "{AUTO_SESSION_ID}"
   178	          lineage.parentSessionId: null
   179	          lineage.lineageMode: "new"
   180	          lineage.generation: 1
   181	          lineage.continuedFromRun: null
   182	        output: "{spec_folder}/research/deep-research-config.json"
   183	
   184	      step_create_state_log:
   185	        action: "Initialize JSONL state log with config record"
   186	        content: '{"type":"config","topic":"{research_topic}","maxIterations":{max_iterations},"convergenceThreshold":{convergence_threshold},"createdAt":"{ISO_8601_NOW}","specFolder":"{spec_folder}"}'
   187	        output: "{spec_folder}/research/deep-research-state.jsonl"
   188	
   189	      step_create_strategy:
   190	        action: "Create strategy file from template with initial questions"
   191	        template: .opencode/skill/sk-deep-research/assets/deep_research_strategy.md
   192	        populate:
   193	          topic: "{research_topic}"
   194	          key_questions: "Derive 3-5 key questions from the research topic"
   195	          known_context: "None"
   196	          known_context_summary: "None"
   197	          max_iterations: "{max_iterations}"
   198	          convergence_threshold: "{convergence_threshold}"
   199	        output: "{spec_folder}/research/deep-research-strategy.md"
   200	
   201	      step_create_registry:
   202	        action: "Initialize reducer-owned findings registry"
   203	        content: '{"openQuestions":[],"resolvedQuestions":[],"keyFindings":[],"ruledOutDirections":[],"metrics":{"iterationsCompleted":0,"openQuestions":0,"resolvedQuestions":0,"keyFindings":0,"convergenceScore":0,"coverageBySources":{}}}'
   204	        output: "{spec_folder}/research/findings-registry.json"
   205	
   206	      step_enrich_strategy_context:
   207	        action: "Ensure Known Context is written only after strategy.md exists"
   208	        condition: "prior_context_found"
   209	        edit: "{spec_folder}/research/deep-research-strategy.md"
   210	        note: "Append or replace the Known Context section with prior_context_summary and retained detail from prior_context"
   211	
   212	      step_init_complete:
   213	        log: "Initialization complete. Config, state, and strategy files created."
   214	        set: { current_iteration: 1, current_segment: 1, stuck_count: 0 }
   215	
   216	  # ═══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════
   217	  # PHASE 2: ITERATION LOOP
   218	  # ═══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════
   219	  phase_loop:
   220	    purpose: Dispatch agent iterations until convergence
   221	    repeat: true
   222	    max_repeats: "{max_iterations}"
   223	    steps:
   224	
   225	      step_read_state:
   226	        action: "Read current state from JSONL and strategy"
   227	        read:
   228	          - "{spec_folder}/research/deep-research-state.jsonl"
   229	          - "{spec_folder}/research/deep-research-strategy.md"
   230	        extract:
   231	          - iteration_count: "Count lines where type === 'iteration'"
   232	          - current_iteration: "iteration_count + 1"
   233	          - current_segment: "Latest segment_start event segment, else 1"
   234	          - last_newInfoRatio: "Extract newInfoRatio from last iteration record"
   235	          - last_focus: "Extract focus from latest iteration record, else 'none yet'"
   236	          - ratio_prev: "Extract newInfoRatio from second-latest iteration record, else 'N/A'"
   237	          - ratio_latest: "Extract newInfoRatio from latest iteration record, else 'N/A'"
   238	          - next_focus: "Extract 'Next Focus' section from strategy.md"
   239	          - remaining_questions: "Count unchecked items in 'Key Questions'"
   240	          - remaining_questions_list: "List unchecked key questions from strategy.md"
   241	          - answered_count: "Count answered questions from strategy.md"
   242	          - total_questions: "Count total questions tracked in strategy.md"
   243	          - least_explored: "First unanswered question not covered by the most recent iteration focus, else first unanswered question"
   244	          - last_3_summaries: "Summarize the latest 3 iteration records as 'run N: focus (ratio)'"
   245	          - latest_status: "Extract status from latest iteration record, else 'none yet'"
   246	
   247	      step_check_pause_sentinel:
   248	        action: "Check for pause sentinel file"
   249	        check: "Does {spec_folder}/research/.deep-research-pause exist?"
   250	        if_exists:
   251	          log_event: '{"type":"event","event":"userPaused","mode":"research","run":{current_iteration},"stopReason":"userPaused","sentinelPath":"{spec_folder}/research/.deep-research-pause","timestamp":"{ISO_8601_NOW}","sessionId":"{config.lineage.sessionId}","generation":{config.lineage.generation}}'
   252	          message: "Research paused. Delete research/.deep-research-pause to resume."
   253	          halt: true
   254	        if_not_exists:
   255	          proceed: true
   256	
   257	      step_graph_convergence:
   258	        action: "Evaluate coverage-graph convergence before the inline 3-signal vote and persist the graph decision snapshot"
   259	        mcp_tool:
   260	          name: mcp__spec_kit_memory__deep_loop_graph_convergence

exec

/bin/zsh -lc "nl -ba .opencode/command/spec_kit/assets/spec_kit_deep-review_auto.yaml | sed -n '1,260p'" in /Users/michelkerkmeester/MEGA/Development/Code_Environment/Public
 succeeded in 0ms:
     1	# ─────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
     2	# DEEP REVIEW: AUTONOMOUS DEEP REVIEW LOOP (CONFIRM MODE)
     3	# ─────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
     4	# DEEP REVIEW: AUTONOMOUS DEEP REVIEW LOOP (CONFIRM MODE)
     5	# ─────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
     6	role: Deep Review Loop Manager
     7	purpose: Iterative code/spec review with convergence detection and user approval gates
     8	action: Run deep-review loop with user confirmation at each phase transition
     9	operating_mode:
    10	  workflow: iterative_loop
    11	  workflow_compliance: MANDATORY
    12	  workflow_execution: interactive
    13	  approvals: multi_gate
    14	  tracking: progressive_review_state
    15	  validation: convergence_detection
    16	
    17	# ─────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
    18	# OPERATING PRINCIPLES
    19	# ─────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
    20	operating_principles:
    21	  core: "Fresh context per iteration + externalized state = no context degradation"
    22	  approach: "Dispatch focused review agent per dimension, show results, get approval, repeat or stop"
    23	  mandate: "Never hold findings in memory; write everything to files. Pause for user at each gate. Review target is READ-ONLY."
    24	
    25	# ─────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
    26	# USER INPUTS (from setup phase)
    27	# ─────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
    28	user_inputs:
    29	  review_target: "[REVIEW_TARGET] - What to review. REQUIRED."
    30	  review_target_type: "[spec-folder|skill|agent|track|files] - Target type for scope derivation. REQUIRED."
    31	  review_dimensions: "[all|correctness,security,traceability,maintainability] - Dimensions to check. Default: all."
    32	  spec_folder: "[SPEC_FOLDER] - Spec folder path for state files. REQUIRED."
    33	  lineage_mode: "[auto|resume|restart] - Session lifecycle intent. Default: auto. The runtime only persists lineage events for `resume` (same sessionId, no archive) and `restart` (new sessionId, generation+1, prior review/ archived). `fork` and `completed-continue` are deferred and no longer accepted — see sk-deep-review/references/loop_protocol.md §Lifecycle Branches."
    34	  max_iterations: 7
    35	  convergence_threshold: 0.10
    36	
    37	# ─────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
    38	# CONTEXT LOADING
    39	# ─────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
    40	context_loading:
    41	  trigger: "At workflow START, before phase_init"
    42	  purpose: "Load prior review context for the target and buffer it until strategy.md exists"
    43	  mcp_integration:
    44	    tool: memory_context
    45	    note: "Call MCP tools directly - NEVER through Code Mode"
    46	    parameters: { input: "{review_target}", mode: "focused", intent: "understand", includeContent: true }
    47	  when_to_skip: ["User says 'skip context' or 'fresh start'"]
    48	  behavior:
    49	    if_context_found: "Store full results as prior_context plus a concise prior_context_summary; inject after strategy.md is created."
    50	    if_no_context: "Set prior_context and prior_context_summary to 'None' and continue."
    51	
    52	# ─────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
    53	# SKILL REFERENCE
    54	# ─────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
    55	skill_reference:
    56	  skill: sk-deep-review
    57	  skill_md: .opencode/skill/sk-deep-review/SKILL.md
    58	  references:
    59	    loop_protocol: .opencode/skill/sk-deep-review/references/loop_protocol.md
    60	    state_format: .opencode/skill/sk-deep-review/references/state_format.md
    61	    convergence: .opencode/skill/sk-deep-review/references/convergence.md
    62	  templates:
    63	    config: .opencode/skill/sk-deep-review/assets/deep_review_config.json
    64	    strategy: .opencode/skill/sk-deep-review/assets/deep_review_strategy.md
    65	
    66	# ─────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
    67	# AGENT CONFIGURATION
    68	# ─────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
    69	agent_config:
    70	  agent: deep-review
    71	  agent_file: ".opencode/agent/deep-review.md"
    72	  # Runtime-agnostic: resolve agent from active runtime directory (see AGENTS.md). Default shown is Claude runtime.
    73	  mode: subagent
    74	  model: opus
    75	  leaf_only: true
    76	  tools: [Read, Write, Edit, Bash, Grep, Glob, mcp__cocoindex_code__search]
    77	  mcp_servers: [spec_kit_memory, cocoindex_code]
    78	  tool_call_budget: { target: 9, soft_max: 12, hard_max: 13 }
    79	
    80	# ─────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
    81	# STATE FILE PATHS
    82	# ─────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
    83	state_paths:
    84	  config: "{spec_folder}/review/deep-review-config.json"
    85	  state_log: "{spec_folder}/review/deep-review-state.jsonl"
    86	  findings_registry: "{spec_folder}/review/deep-review-findings-registry.json"
    87	  strategy: "{spec_folder}/review/deep-review-strategy.md"
    88	  dashboard: "{spec_folder}/review/deep-review-dashboard.md"
    89	  iteration_pattern: "{spec_folder}/review/iterations/iteration-{NNN}.md"
    90	  review_output: "{spec_folder}/review/review-report.md"
    91	
    92	# ─────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
    93	# WORKFLOW
    94	# ─────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
    95	workflow:
    96	
    97	  # ═══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════
    98	  # PHASE 1: INITIALIZATION
    99	  # ═══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════
   100	  phase_init:
   101	    purpose: Create all state files for the review session and resolve review scope
   102	    steps:
   103	
   104	      step_preflight_contract:
   105	        action: "Validate required setup bindings and executable workflow contract before any file writes"
   106	        verify:
   107	          - required_values_present: [review_target, review_target_type, review_dimensions, spec_folder, max_iterations, convergence_threshold]
   108	          - spec_folder_is_within: "specs/ or .opencode/specs/ (canonicalize alias roots before validation)"
   109	          - unresolved_placeholders: "FAIL if any user-facing template references placeholders not produced by earlier steps"
   110	          - tool_contract: "FAIL if executable steps reference tools outside the command allowlist"
   111	        on_fail: "Halt with STATUS=FAIL and report the missing binding or unsupported contract reference"
   112	
   113	      step_create_directories:
   114	        action: "Create spec folder and canonical review packet directories if they don't exist"
   115	        command: "mkdir -p {spec_folder}/review/iterations"
   116	
   117	      step_migrate_legacy_review_state:
   118	        action: "Rehome legacy review artifacts into review/iterations before session classification"
   119	        detect:
   120	          canonical_review_state:
   121	            - "{spec_folder}/review/deep-review-config.json"
   122	            - "{spec_folder}/review/deep-review-state.jsonl"
   123	            - "{spec_folder}/review/deep-review-findings-registry.json"
   124	            - "{spec_folder}/review/deep-review-strategy.md"
   125	          legacy_review_state:
   126	            - "{spec_folder}/scratch/deep-research-config.json"
   127	            - "{spec_folder}/scratch/deep-research-state.jsonl"
   128	            - "{spec_folder}/scratch/deep-review-strategy.md"
   129	            - "{spec_folder}/scratch/deep-review-dashboard.md"
   130	            - "{spec_folder}/scratch/iteration-*.md"
   131	            - "{spec_folder}/scratch/.deep-research-pause"
   132	            - "{spec_folder}/review/iteration-*.md"
   133	            - "{spec_folder}/review-report.md"
   134	          legacy_review_markers:
   135	            - "scratch/deep-review-strategy.md exists"
   136	            - "scratch/deep-research-config.json declares mode == 'review' OR scratch/deep-research-state.jsonl contains mode == 'review'"
   137	        migrate_only:
   138	          - "{spec_folder}/scratch/deep-research-config.json -> {spec_folder}/review/deep-review-config.json"
   139	          - "{spec_folder}/scratch/deep-research-state.jsonl -> {spec_folder}/review/deep-review-state.jsonl"
   140	          - "{spec_folder}/scratch/deep-review-strategy.md -> {spec_folder}/review/deep-review-strategy.md"
   141	          - "{spec_folder}/scratch/deep-review-dashboard.md -> {spec_folder}/review/deep-review-dashboard.md"
   142	          - "{spec_folder}/scratch/iteration-*.md -> {spec_folder}/review/iterations/"
   143	          - "{spec_folder}/scratch/.deep-research-pause -> {spec_folder}/review/.deep-review-pause"
   144	          - "{spec_folder}/review/iteration-*.md -> {spec_folder}/review/iterations/"
   145	          - "{spec_folder}/review-report.md -> {spec_folder}/review/review-report.md"
   146	        on_canonical_present: "Leave canonical review/ state untouched and do not overwrite it with legacy scratch artifacts."
   147	        on_legacy_detected: "Move only the review-specific whitelist, append a migration event to the canonical JSONL, and leave unrelated scratch files untouched."
   148	        on_conflict: "If canonical review/ state and legacy scratch review state both exist but disagree, halt for operator repair instead of merging contradictory state."
   149	        command: "mkdir -p {spec_folder}/review/iterations && if [ ! -e {spec_folder}/review/deep-review-config.json ] && [ ! -e {spec_folder}/review/deep-review-state.jsonl ] && [ ! -e {spec_folder}/review/deep-review-strategy.md ] && [ -e {spec_folder}/scratch/deep-review-strategy.md ] && ( [ -e {spec_folder}/scratch/deep-research-config.json ] || [ -e {spec_folder}/scratch/deep-research-state.jsonl ] ); then [ -e {spec_folder}/scratch/deep-research-config.json ] && mv {spec_folder}/scratch/deep-research-config.json {spec_folder}/review/deep-review-config.json; [ -e {spec_folder}/scratch/deep-research-state.jsonl ] && mv {spec_folder}/scratch/deep-research-state.jsonl {spec_folder}/review/deep-review-state.jsonl; [ -e {spec_folder}/scratch/deep-review-strategy.md ] && mv {spec_folder}/scratch/deep-review-strategy.md {spec_folder}/review/deep-review-strategy.md; [ -e {spec_folder}/scratch/deep-review-dashboard.md ] && mv {spec_folder}/scratch/deep-review-dashboard.md {spec_folder}/review/deep-review-dashboard.md; find {spec_folder}/scratch -maxdepth 1 -name 'iteration-*.md' -exec mv {} {spec_folder}/review/iterations/ \\; ; [ -e {spec_folder}/scratch/.deep-research-pause ] && mv {spec_folder}/scratch/.deep-research-pause {spec_folder}/review/.deep-review-pause; [ -e {spec_folder}/review-report.md ] && mv {spec_folder}/review-report.md {spec_folder}/review/review-report.md; if [ -e {spec_folder}/review/deep-review-state.jsonl ]; then printf '%s\n' '{\"type\":\"event\",\"event\":\"migration\",\"mode\":\"review\",\"legacyArtifacts\":[\"deep-research-config.json\",\"deep-research-state.jsonl\",\".deep-research-pause\"],\"canonicalArtifacts\":[\"deep-review-config.json\",\"deep-review-state.jsonl\",\".deep-review-pause\"],\"timestamp\":\"{ISO_8601_NOW}\"}' >> {spec_folder}/review/deep-review-state.jsonl; fi; fi; find {spec_folder}/review -maxdepth 1 -name 'iteration-*.md' -exec mv {} {spec_folder}/review/iterations/ \\; 2>/dev/null || true"
   150	
   151	      step_classify_session:
   152	        action: "Classify the session before writing files"
   153	        inspect:
   154	          - "{spec_folder}/review/deep-review-config.json"
   155	          - "{spec_folder}/review/deep-review-state.jsonl"
   156	          - "{spec_folder}/review/deep-review-findings-registry.json"
   157	          - "{spec_folder}/review/deep-review-strategy.md"
   158	        classify:
   159	          fresh: "None of the three state artifacts exist"
   160	          resume: "Config, JSONL, and strategy all exist and config.mode == 'review' and agree on target/spec folder"
   161	          completed-session: "Resume artifacts exist and config.status == 'complete'"
   162	          invalid-state: "Any partial, missing, or contradictory combination"
   163	        outputs:
   164	          - session_state: "fresh | resume | completed-session | invalid-state"
   165	        on_resume:
   166	          show_dashboard: "{spec_folder}/review/deep-review-dashboard.md"
   167	          ask: "Existing review session is consistent. Resume where it left off, or restart (archive the current review/ tree and start a fresh session)?"
   168	          options: [resume, restart, cancel]
   169	          on_resume_choice:
   170	            set:
   171	              lineage_mode: "resume"
   172	              parent_session_id: "{session_id}"
   173	            append_jsonl: '{"type":"event","event":"resumed","mode":"review","sessionId":"{session_id}","parentSessionId":"{session_id}","lineageMode":"resume","continuedFromRun":{iteration_count},"timestamp":"{ISO_8601_NOW}","generation":{generation}}'
   174	            skip_to: gate_init_approval
   175	          on_restart_choice:
   176	            archive: "{spec_folder}/review -> {spec_folder}/review_archive/{timestamp_slug}"
   177	            set:
   178	              lineage_mode: "restart"
   179	              parent_session_id: "{prior_session_id}"
   180	              generation: "{prior_generation + 1}"
   181	            append_jsonl: '{"type":"event","event":"restarted","mode":"review","sessionId":"{session_id}","parentSessionId":"{prior_session_id}","lineageMode":"restart","generation":{generation},"archivedPath":"{spec_folder}/review_archive/{timestamp_slug}","timestamp":"{ISO_8601_NOW}"}'
   182	            skip_to: step_create_config
   183	          on_cancel_choice:
   184	            halt: true
   185	            message: "Review session preserved. Manually archive or edit review/ before re-running."
   186	          note: "fork and completed-continue branches are deferred. The reducer still reads `lineageMode` from config for dashboards and analysis, but only `new`, `resume`, and `restart` are runtime-supported in this release. See sk-deep-review/references/loop_protocol.md `Session Lifecycle` for the canonical one-session model."
   187	        on_completed_session:
   188	          log: "Prior session already completed. Either archive the completed review/ tree and start a fresh session, or jump straight to synthesis with the existing artifacts."
   189	          skip_to: phase_synthesis
   190	        on_invalid_state:
   191	          halt: true
   192	          message: "Existing deep-review state in review/ is incomplete or contradictory. Repair or archive the invalid review packet before continuing."
   193	        on_fresh:
   194	          action: "Proceed with a new session"
   195	
   196	      step_scope_discovery:
   197	        action: "Resolve review target to a concrete file list based on target type"
   198	        resolve:
   199	          spec-folder: |
   200	            1. Read spec.md, plan.md, tasks.md, checklist.md, implementation-summary.md
   201	            2. Discover implementation files referenced in spec artifacts
   202	            3. Discover test files associated with implementation
   203	            4. Set scope = all discovered files
   204	          skill: |
   205	            1. Read SKILL.md from .opencode/skill/{skill_name}/
   206	            2. Discover references/, assets/, scripts/ contents
   207	            3. Find agent definitions referencing this skill across runtimes
   208	            4. Find command entry points referencing this skill
   209	            5. Set scope = all discovered files
   210	          agent: |
   211	            1. Find agent definition across all runtimes (.claude/agents/, .opencode/agent/, .codex/agents/, .agents/, .gemini/agents/)
   212	            2. Compare agent definitions for consistency
   213	            3. Set scope = all discovered agent files
   214	          track: |
   215	            1. List all child spec folders under specs/{track}/ or .opencode/specs/{track}/
   216	            2. For each: read spec.md + checklist.md
   217	            3. Set scope = all child spec artifacts
   218	          files: |
   219	            1. Expand glob patterns from review_target
   220	            2. Validate all files exist
   221	            3. Discover immediate cross-references (imports, links)
   222	            4. Set scope = expanded file list + cross-references
   223	        outputs:
   224	          - review_scope_files: "List of all files in review scope"
   225	          - cross_reference_targets: "{ spec_paths: [...], code_paths: [...], test_paths: [...] }"
   226	
   227	      step_order_dimensions:
   228	        action: "Order review dimensions based on risk priority"
   229	        algorithm: |
   230	          1. Iteration 0 (inventory pass): Build artifact map, identify file types, estimate complexity
   231	          2. Subsequent iterations follow risk-ordered deep passes:
   232	             correctness → security → traceability → maintainability
   233	          3. If review_dimensions != "all", filter to only requested dimensions
   234	          4. Derive traceability protocol plan:
   235	             - core: spec_code, checklist_evidence
   236	             - overlay: skill_agent, agent_cross_runtime, feature_catalog_code, playbook_capability
   237	          5. Store ordered list as dimension_queue
   238	        outputs:
   239	          - dimension_queue: "Ordered list of dimensions to review"
   240	          - inventory_pass: true
   241	
   242	      step_create_config:
   243	        action: "Create deep-review-config.json from template with review-specific fields"
   244	        template: .opencode/skill/sk-deep-review/assets/deep_review_config.json
   245	        populate:
   246	          topic: "Review: {review_target}"
   247	          mode: "review"
   248	          sessionId: "{ISO_8601_NOW}"
   249	          parentSessionId: null
   250	          lineageMode: "new"
   251	          generation: 1
   252	          continuedFromRun: null
   253	          reviewTarget: "{review_target}"
   254	          reviewTargetType: "{review_target_type}"
   255	          # Normalize to JSON array before writing (expand "all" to ["correctness","security","traceability","maintainability"]).
   256	          reviewDimensions: "{review_dimensions}"
   257	          reviewScopeFiles: "{review_scope_files}"
   258	          severityThreshold: "P2"
   259	          crossReference:
   260	            core: ["spec_code", "checklist_evidence"]

 succeeded in 0ms:
     1	# ─────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
     2	# DEEP REVIEW: AUTONOMOUS DEEP REVIEW LOOP (AUTO MODE)
     3	# ─────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
     4	# DEEP REVIEW: AUTONOMOUS DEEP REVIEW LOOP (AUTO MODE)
     5	# ─────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
     6	role: Deep Review Loop Manager
     7	purpose: Iterative code/spec review with convergence detection across review dimensions
     8	action: Run deep-review loop from initialization through synthesis
     9	operating_mode:
    10	  workflow: iterative_loop
    11	  workflow_compliance: MANDATORY
    12	  workflow_execution: autonomous
    13	  approvals: none
    14	  tracking: progressive_review_state
    15	  validation: convergence_detection
    16	
    17	# ─────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
    18	# OPERATING PRINCIPLES
    19	# ─────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
    20	operating_principles:
    21	  core: "Fresh context per iteration + externalized state = no context degradation"
    22	  approach: "Dispatch focused review agent per dimension, evaluate convergence, repeat or stop"
    23	  mandate: "Never hold findings in memory; write everything to files. Review target is READ-ONLY."
    24	
    25	# ─────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
    26	# USER INPUTS (from setup phase)
    27	# ─────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
    28	user_inputs:
    29	  review_target: "[REVIEW_TARGET] - What to review. REQUIRED."
    30	  review_target_type: "[spec-folder|skill|agent|track|files] - Target type for scope derivation. REQUIRED."
    31	  review_dimensions: "[all|correctness,security,traceability,maintainability] - Dimensions to check. Default: all."
    32	  spec_folder: "[SPEC_FOLDER] - Spec folder path for state files. REQUIRED."
    33	  lineage_mode: "[auto|resume|restart] - Session lifecycle intent. Default: auto. The runtime only persists lineage events for `resume` (same sessionId, no archive) and `restart` (new sessionId, generation+1, prior review/ archived). `fork` and `completed-continue` are deferred and no longer accepted — see sk-deep-review/references/loop_protocol.md §Lifecycle Branches."
    34	  max_iterations: 7
    35	  convergence_threshold: 0.10
    36	
    37	# ─────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
    38	# CONTEXT LOADING
    39	# ─────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
    40	context_loading:
    41	  trigger: "At workflow START, before phase_init"
    42	  purpose: "Load prior review context for the target and buffer it until strategy.md exists"
    43	  mcp_integration:
    44	    tool: memory_context
    45	    note: "Call MCP tools directly - NEVER through Code Mode"
    46	    parameters: { input: "{review_target}", mode: "focused", intent: "understand", includeContent: true }
    47	  when_to_skip: ["User says 'skip context' or 'fresh start'"]
    48	  behavior:
    49	    if_context_found: "Store full results as prior_context plus a concise prior_context_summary; inject after strategy.md is created."
    50	    if_no_context: "Set prior_context and prior_context_summary to 'None' and continue."
    51	
    52	# ─────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
    53	# SKILL REFERENCE
    54	# ─────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
    55	skill_reference:
    56	  skill: sk-deep-review
    57	  skill_md: .opencode/skill/sk-deep-review/SKILL.md
    58	  references:
    59	    loop_protocol: .opencode/skill/sk-deep-review/references/loop_protocol.md
    60	    state_format: .opencode/skill/sk-deep-review/references/state_format.md
    61	    convergence: .opencode/skill/sk-deep-review/references/convergence.md
    62	  templates:
    63	    config: .opencode/skill/sk-deep-review/assets/deep_review_config.json
    64	    strategy: .opencode/skill/sk-deep-review/assets/deep_review_strategy.md
    65	
    66	# ─────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
    67	# AGENT CONFIGURATION
    68	# ─────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
    69	agent_config:
    70	  agent: deep-review
    71	  agent_file: ".opencode/agent/deep-review.md"
    72	  # Canonical path. Runtime-specific directories (e.g. .claude/agents/) reference this source.
    73	  mode: subagent
    74	  model: opus
    75	  leaf_only: true
    76	  tools: [Read, Write, Edit, Bash, Grep, Glob, mcp__cocoindex_code__search]
    77	  mcp_servers: [spec_kit_memory, cocoindex_code]
    78	  tool_call_budget: { target: 9, soft_max: 12, hard_max: 13 }
    79	
    80	# ─────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
    81	# STATE FILE PATHS
    82	# ─────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
    83	state_paths:
    84	  config: "{spec_folder}/review/deep-review-config.json"
    85	  state_log: "{spec_folder}/review/deep-review-state.jsonl"
    86	  findings_registry: "{spec_folder}/review/deep-review-findings-registry.json"
    87	  strategy: "{spec_folder}/review/deep-review-strategy.md"
    88	  dashboard: "{spec_folder}/review/deep-review-dashboard.md"
    89	  iteration_pattern: "{spec_folder}/review/iterations/iteration-{NNN}.md"
    90	  review_output: "{spec_folder}/review/review-report.md"
    91	
    92	# ─────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
    93	# WORKFLOW
    94	# ─────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
    95	workflow:
    96	
    97	  # ═══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════
    98	  # PHASE 1: INITIALIZATION
    99	  # ═══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════
   100	  phase_init:
   101	    purpose: Create all state files for the review session and resolve review scope
   102	    steps:
   103	
   104	      step_preflight_contract:
   105	        action: "Validate required setup bindings and executable workflow contract before any file writes"
   106	        verify:
   107	          - required_values_present: [review_target, review_target_type, review_dimensions, spec_folder, max_iterations, convergence_threshold]
   108	          - spec_folder_is_within: "specs/ or .opencode/specs/ (canonicalize alias roots before validation)"
   109	          - unresolved_placeholders: "FAIL if any user-facing template references placeholders not produced by earlier steps"
   110	          - tool_contract: "FAIL if executable steps reference tools outside the command allowlist"
   111	        on_fail: "Halt with STATUS=FAIL and report the missing binding or unsupported contract reference"
   112	
   113	      step_create_directories:
   114	        action: "Create spec folder and canonical review packet directories if they don't exist"
   115	        command: "mkdir -p {spec_folder}/review/iterations"
   116	
   117	      step_migrate_legacy_review_state:
   118	        action: "Rehome legacy review artifacts into review/iterations before session classification"
   119	        detect:
   120	          canonical_review_state:
   121	            - "{spec_folder}/review/deep-review-config.json"
   122	            - "{spec_folder}/review/deep-review-state.jsonl"
   123	            - "{spec_folder}/review/deep-review-findings-registry.json"
   124	            - "{spec_folder}/review/deep-review-strategy.md"
   125	          legacy_review_state:
   126	            - "{spec_folder}/scratch/deep-research-config.json"
   127	            - "{spec_folder}/scratch/deep-research-state.jsonl"
   128	            - "{spec_folder}/scratch/deep-review-strategy.md"
   129	            - "{spec_folder}/scratch/deep-review-dashboard.md"
   130	            - "{spec_folder}/scratch/iteration-*.md"
   131	            - "{spec_folder}/scratch/.deep-research-pause"
   132	            - "{spec_folder}/review/iteration-*.md"
   133	            - "{spec_folder}/review-report.md"
   134	          legacy_review_markers:
   135	            - "scratch/deep-review-strategy.md exists"
   136	            - "scratch/deep-research-config.json declares mode == 'review' OR scratch/deep-research-state.jsonl contains mode == 'review'"
   137	        migrate_only:
   138	          - "{spec_folder}/scratch/deep-research-config.json -> {spec_folder}/review/deep-review-config.json"
   139	          - "{spec_folder}/scratch/deep-research-state.jsonl -> {spec_folder}/review/deep-review-state.jsonl"
   140	          - "{spec_folder}/scratch/deep-review-strategy.md -> {spec_folder}/review/deep-review-strategy.md"
   141	          - "{spec_folder}/scratch/deep-review-dashboard.md -> {spec_folder}/review/deep-review-dashboard.md"
   142	          - "{spec_folder}/scratch/iteration-*.md -> {spec_folder}/review/iterations/"
   143	          - "{spec_folder}/scratch/.deep-research-pause -> {spec_folder}/review/.deep-review-pause"
   144	          - "{spec_folder}/review/iteration-*.md -> {spec_folder}/review/iterations/"
   145	          - "{spec_folder}/review-report.md -> {spec_folder}/review/review-report.md"
   146	        on_canonical_present: "Leave canonical review/ state untouched and do not overwrite it with legacy scratch artifacts."
   147	        on_legacy_detected: "Move only the review-specific whitelist, append a migration event to the canonical JSONL, and leave unrelated scratch files untouched."
   148	        on_conflict: "If canonical review/ state and legacy scratch review state both exist but disagree, halt for operator repair instead of merging contradictory state."
   149	        command: "mkdir -p {spec_folder}/review/iterations && if [ ! -e {spec_folder}/review/deep-review-config.json ] && [ ! -e {spec_folder}/review/deep-review-state.jsonl ] && [ ! -e {spec_folder}/review/deep-review-strategy.md ] && [ -e {spec_folder}/scratch/deep-review-strategy.md ] && ( [ -e {spec_folder}/scratch/deep-research-config.json ] || [ -e {spec_folder}/scratch/deep-research-state.jsonl ] ); then [ -e {spec_folder}/scratch/deep-research-config.json ] && mv {spec_folder}/scratch/deep-research-config.json {spec_folder}/review/deep-review-config.json; [ -e {spec_folder}/scratch/deep-research-state.jsonl ] && mv {spec_folder}/scratch/deep-research-state.jsonl {spec_folder}/review/deep-review-state.jsonl; [ -e {spec_folder}/scratch/deep-review-strategy.md ] && mv {spec_folder}/scratch/deep-review-strategy.md {spec_folder}/review/deep-review-strategy.md; [ -e {spec_folder}/scratch/deep-review-dashboard.md ] && mv {spec_folder}/scratch/deep-review-dashboard.md {spec_folder}/review/deep-review-dashboard.md; find {spec_folder}/scratch -maxdepth 1 -name 'iteration-*.md' -exec mv {} {spec_folder}/review/iterations/ \\; ; [ -e {spec_folder}/scratch/.deep-research-pause ] && mv {spec_folder}/scratch/.deep-research-pause {spec_folder}/review/.deep-review-pause; [ -e {spec_folder}/review-report.md ] && mv {spec_folder}/review-report.md {spec_folder}/review/review-report.md; if [ -e {spec_folder}/review/deep-review-state.jsonl ]; then printf '%s\n' '{\"type\":\"event\",\"event\":\"migration\",\"mode\":\"review\",\"legacyArtifacts\":[\"deep-research-config.json\",\"deep-research-state.jsonl\",\".deep-research-pause\"],\"canonicalArtifacts\":[\"deep-review-config.json\",\"deep-review-state.jsonl\",\".deep-review-pause\"],\"timestamp\":\"{ISO_8601_NOW}\"}' >> {spec_folder}/review/deep-review-state.jsonl; fi; fi; find {spec_folder}/review -maxdepth 1 -name 'iteration-*.md' -exec mv {} {spec_folder}/review/iterations/ \\; 2>/dev/null || true"
   150

   152	        action: "Classify the session before writing files"
   153	        inspect:

   233	
   234	      step_create_config:
   235	        action: "Create deep-review-config.json from template with review-specific fields"
   236	        template: .opencode/skill/sk-deep-review/assets/deep_review_config.json
   237	        populate:
   238	          topic: "Review: {review_target}"
   239	          mode: "review"
   240	          sessionId: "{ISO_8601_NOW}"
   241	          parentSessionId: null
   242	          lineageMode: "new"
   243	          generation: 1
   244	          continuedFromRun: null
   245	          reviewTarget: "{review_target}"
   246	          reviewTargetType: "{review_target_type}"
   247	          # Normalize to JSON array before writing (expand "all" to ["correctness","security","traceability","maintainability"]).
   248	          reviewDimensions: "{review_dimensions}"
   249	          reviewScopeFiles: "{review_scope_files}"
   250	          severityThreshold: "P2"
   251	          crossReference:
   252	            core: ["spec_code", "checklist_evidence"]
   253	            overlay: ["skill_agent", "agent_cross_runtime", "feature_catalog_code", "playbook_capability"]
   254	          maxIterations: "{max_iterations}"
   255	          convergenceThreshold: "{convergence_threshold}"
   256	          stuckThreshold: 2
   257	          maxDurationMinutes: 120
   258	          specFolder: "{spec_folder}"
   259	          createdAt: "{ISO_8601_NOW}"
   260	          status: "initialized"

 succeeded in 0ms:
     1	# ─────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
     2	# SMART SPECKIT: RESUME WORKFLOW (AUTONOMOUS MODE)
     3	# ─────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
     4	role: Expert Developer using Smart SpecKit for autonomous session resume
     5	purpose: Resume previous work session with automatic context loading
     6	action: Detect session, load context, and present continuation options
     7	
     8	# ─────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
     9	# OPERATING MODE
    10	# ─────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
    11	operating_mode:
    12	  workflow: utility
    13	  compliance: OPTIONAL
    14	  execution: autonomous
    15	  approvals: none
    16	  tracking: session_state_detection
    17	  validation: context_loaded
    18	
    19	resume_philosophy:
    20	  principle: "Context continuity, minimal friction, maximum usefulness"
    21	  approach: "Recover the smallest useful context packet, then continue"
    22	
    23	# ─────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
    24	# USER INPUTS
    25	# ─────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
    26	user_inputs:
    27	  spec_folder: "[SPEC_FOLDER] - Spec folder path. Leave empty to auto-detect from most recent memory."
    28	
    29	# ─────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
    30	# SESSION DETECTION
    31	# ─────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
    32	session_detection:
    33	  priority_order: ["CLI argument", "Deterministic candidate ranking", "Semantic memory search", "Trigger phrase matching", "Most recent indexed continuity support artifact by mtime"]
    34	  note: "Stateless architecture - no .spec-active marker file used. Deterministic ranking is preferred before memory-only fallback."
    35	  deterministic_ranking:
    36	    roots: ["specs/", ".opencode/specs/"]
    37	    normalization: "Canonicalize alias roots before ranking (specs/ vs .opencode/specs/)"
    38	    filters: ["archive", "test", "fixture", "scratch"]
    39	    tie_breakers: ["artifact completeness", "recent activity", "stable path sort"]
    40	    confidence_contract:
    41	      high_confidence: "auto-select top ranked candidate"
    42	      low_confidence_autonomous: "safe fall-through: do not auto-select, report no confident session and request explicit path"
    43	  tier_details:
    44	    tier_1_cli:
    45	      method: "Parse $ARGUMENTS for spec folder path"
    46	      priority: "highest"
    47	    tier_1b_ranked_candidates:
    48	      method: "Enumerate candidate folders from both roots, normalize aliases, filter non-active folders, rank deterministically"
    49	      fallback: "tier_2"
    50	    tier_2_semantic:
    51	      method: "memory_list({ limit: 3, sortBy: 'updated_at' })"
    52	      fallback: "tier_3"
    53	    tier_3_triggers:
    54	      method: "memory_match_triggers({ prompt: 'resume work session context' })"
    55	      fallback: "tier_4"
    56	    tier_4_recent_artifacts:
    57	      method: "glob {.opencode/,}specs/**/{handover.md,implementation-summary.md,tasks.md} | filter active folders | sort by mtime | head -1"
    58	      fallback: "report no session"
    59	  phase_folder_detection:
    60	    trigger: "After spec folder resolved, check if it contains [0-9][0-9][0-9]-*/ child directories"
    61	    action: "If phase children found → list them with per-child tasks.md completion status → present phase selection UI before proceeding"
    62	    skip: "If --phase-folder was provided in $ARGUMENTS, skip detection and use the specified child directly"
    63	    detection_method_value: "phase-folder"
    64	  fallback: { on_no_memory: "Report no active session, suggest /spec_kit:complete" }
    65	
    66	# ─────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
    67	# CONTEXT LOADING
    68	# ─────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
    69	context_loading_priority:
    70	  order: ["Primary: handover.md (<24h old)", "Primary: _memory.continuity in implementation-summary.md", "Primary: supporting spec docs (tasks/checklist/plan/decision-record)", "Secondary: graph-metadata.json packet hints", "Secondary: session_bootstrap() or memory_context(mode: resume, profile: resume)", "Secondary: memory_search() with resume anchors"]
    71	  note: "Recover from the canonical packet first: handover, then _memory.continuity, then supporting spec docs. Use MCP enrichment only when that packet is still thin."
    72	
    73	packet_graph_metadata:
    74	  role: "secondary packet hint"
    75	  allowed_signals: ["dependencies", "supersession", "related packets", "key files"]
    76	  constraint: "Never replace the canonical handover/continuity/spec-doc recovery ladder."
    77	
    78	memory_loading:
    79	  mode: automatic
    80	  behavior: "Auto-load handover.md (<24h) first, else run session_bootstrap() or memory_context() in resume mode with profile=resume without prompting; stop as soon as one safe next action can be named"
    81	  selection: most_recent
    82	  max_files: 1
    83	  mcp_integration:
    84	    tool: memory_context
    85	    note: "Call MCP tools directly - NEVER through Code Mode"
    86	    parameters: { input: "resume previous work continue session", mode: "resume", profile: "resume", specFolder: "{spec_folder_path}", includeContent: true }
    87	
    88	smart_memory_logic:
    89	  objective: "Recover enough state to continue safely, not every detail from prior sessions"
    90	  essentials: ["current phase or task", "last confirmed action", "next safe action", "blockers or none", "relevant artifact or file"]
    91	  sufficiency_rule: "Stop once next safe action is known plus any two supporting essentials"
    92	  gap_fill_order:
    93	    - "If current phase or task is missing, inspect tasks.md/checklist.md/handover.md"
    94	    - "If next safe action is missing, read `_memory.continuity`, then use memory_context(mode: resume) and targeted memory_search on next-steps/state"
    95	    - "If blockers are missing, target blockers/summary"
    96	    - "If a concrete starting point is missing, use tasks.md or implementation-summary.md before loading more memory"
    97	    - "If ambiguity remains, surface uncertainty instead of guessing"
    98	
    99	stale_session_detection:
   100	  check: "last_modified > 7 days"
   101	  autonomous_behavior: "Warn about stale context but continue"
   102	
   103	# ─────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
   104	# CONFIDENCE & CLARIFICATION FRAMEWORK
   105	# ─────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
   106	confidence_framework:
   107	  thresholds:
   108	    high: { range: "80-100%", action: "Proceed with context loading and resume" }
   109	    medium: { range: "40-79%", action: "Proceed but warn about potential context staleness" }
   110	    low: { range: "0-39%", action: "Warn user about context reliability issues and avoid guessing the next step" }
   111	  scoring_weights: { session_recency: 0.40, artifact_completeness: 0.30, memory_availability: 0.20, codebase_changes: 0.10 }
   112	  reply_format: ["Confidence: NN%", "Context source: handover|memory", "Now", "Last confirmed", "Next safe action"]
   113	  escalation: { timebox_minutes: 5, failed_threshold: 2 }
   114	
   115	# ─────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
   116	# WORKFLOW
   117	# ─────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
   118	workflow:
   119	  step_1_session_detection:
   120	    purpose: Detect active session from CLI argument or recent canonical spec artifacts
   121	    activities:
   122	      - Check CLI argument for spec folder
   123	      - If no argument, build deterministic candidates from `specs/` and `.opencode/specs/`
   124	      - Canonicalize aliases and filter archive/test/fixture/scratch paths
   125	      - Rank candidates deterministically with stable tie-breakers
   126	      - If low confidence in autonomous mode, fall through safely and request explicit path
   127	      - If no ranked candidate, continue to semantic/MCP fallback
   128	      - Validate resolved spec folder exists
   129	    outputs: { spec_folder: detected_path, detection_method: argument_or_memory }
   130	    validation: session_detected
   131	
   132	  step_2_load_memory:
   133	    purpose: Load context using handover first, then recover only the missing essentials needed for a useful resume
   134	    activities:
   135	      - Check for handover.md in spec_folder (<24h old)
   136	      - If recent handover exists, load as primary context
   137	      - If handover is absent or insufficient, read `_memory.continuity` from implementation-summary.md
   138	      - Read supporting spec docs (`tasks.md`, `checklist.md`, `plan.md`, `decision-record.md`) before calling any MCP recovery tool
   139	      - If the canonical packet is still insufficient, call session_bootstrap() first or memory_context() with mode="resume" and profile="resume"
   140	      - Extract Resume Essentials (current phase/task, last confirmed action, next safe action, blockers, relevant artifact/file)
   141	      - If specific essentials are still missing, run targeted anchored memory_search() for those gaps instead of broad loading
   142	      - If ambiguity remains after targeted gap filling, mark confidence low instead of inventing state
   143	    context_priority: ["handover.md", "_memory.continuity", "supporting spec docs", "session_bootstrap()", "memory_context(mode: resume, profile: resume)", "memory_search() with resume anchors"]
   144	    mcp_tool:
   145	      name: memory_context
   146	      note: "Call directly - NEVER through Code Mode. Use it only after the canonical packet is still thin; use anchored memory_search() only for targeted gap filling."
   147	      parameters: { input: "resume previous work continue session", mode: "resume", profile: "resume", specFolder: "{detected_spec_folder}", includeContent: true }
   148	    outputs: { memory_loaded: true, context_source: "handover|continuity|spec_docs|memory_context|memory_search", context_summary: extracted_context, resume_packet: "now|last|next|blockers|artifact" }
   149	    validation: context_loaded
   150	
   151	  step_3_calculate_progress:
   152	    purpose: Calculate task and checklist progress
   153	    activities: [Parse tasks.md for completion status, Parse checklist.md for verification status, Calculate percentages, Identify pending items]
   154	    outputs: { tasks_progress: percentage, checklist_progress: percentage, pending_items: list }
   155	    validation: progress_calculated
   156	
   157	  step_4_present_resume:
   158	    purpose: Display a concise resume brief with one recommended next-safe-action
   159	    activities: [Display spec folder and last activity, Show progress bars, Show Now/Last confirmed/Next safe action/Blockers, Cite the artifact or task that justifies the recommendation, Proceed directly to continue work]
   160	    outputs: { resume_summary: displayed, continuation_mode: ready }
   161	    validation: resume_complete
   162	
   163	stale_session:
   164	  threshold_days: 7
   165	  detection: { check: "last_modified > 7 days", action: "Flag as stale but proceed in auto mode" }
   166	  autonomous_behavior: "Warn about stale context but continue"
   167	
   168	# ─────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
   169	# WORKFLOW TERMINATION
   170	# ─────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
   171	termination:
   172	  after_step: 4
   173	  message: "Session resumed successfully. Ready to continue work."
   174	  next_steps:
   175	    - "Continue from pending work"
   176	    - "Review implementation summary"
   177	    - "Run /spec_kit:implement if tasks remain"
   178	
   179	crash_recovery:
   180	  command_reference: "/spec_kit:resume"
   181	  description: "Recovery is handled inside the resume workflow through handover.md, then _memory.continuity, then supporting spec docs, with MCP enrichment only when the canonical packet is thin"
   182	  when_to_use: ["Session interrupted unexpectedly", "Context compaction detected", "Need to recover without handover.md"]
   183	  integration_with_resume:
   184	    relationship: "/spec_kit:resume = standard continuation + interrupted-session recovery"
   185	    recommendation: "Use /spec_kit:resume for both ordinary continuation and crash recovery"
   186	
   187	# ─────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
   188	# ERROR RECOVERY
   189	# ─────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
   190	error_recovery:
   191	  no_active_session: "Report no session, suggest /spec_kit:complete"
   192	  spec_folder_missing: "Report not found, ask user to specify or create"
   193	  memory_search_failed: { action: "Proceed only with essentials already recovered", fallback: "Offer /spec_kit:resume <spec-folder> or start fresh" }
   194	  stale_session_detected: "Warn user, proceed with caution"
   195	  crash_detected: "Continue with the built-in resume recovery chain"
   196	  insufficient_context: "State what is known, call out what is missing, and avoid guessing the next step"
   197	
   198	# ─────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
   199	# RULES
   200	# ─────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
   201	rules:
   202	  ALWAYS:
   203	  - detect_session_before_loading
   204	  - load_most_recent_memory_automatically
   205	  - calculate_progress_from_artifacts
   206	  - display_clear_summary
   207	  - use_mcp_tools_directly
   208	  - stop_loading_when_context_is_sufficient
   209	  - recommend_one_safe_next_action
   210	  NEVER:
   211	  - prompt_for_memory_selection_in_auto_mode
   212	  - block_on_stale_session
   213	  - proceed_without_valid_spec_folder
   214	  - call_mcp_through_code_mode
   215	  - dump_extra_memory_when_the_next_step_is_already_clear
   216	  - guess_missing_state_when_confidence_is_low
